programme.desc: Dave Turin and his crew turn their trommel up to double speed hoping to get the most gold from Montana's historic Birdseye mine. Dirty water and ground that's not producing challenge the crew, forcing Dave to call an audible at the last minute.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: All In

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Factory of Death
programme.desc: A deserted facility in the remote countryside features mysterious graffiti that may be highly advanced mathematical equations pointing to a dark secret; experts investigate this classified military wasteland with a deadly past.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghosts of Black Mountain
programme.desc: Ghostly remnants of a beautifully constructed town in the remote backwoods of Kentucky suggests a forgotten tale of utter catastrophe and devastation. Experts investigate and uncover the dark and oppressive history of a deadly industrial mining complex.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Doom of El Dorado
programme.desc: The haunting remnants of a settlement in the Nevada desert lies scattered with decaying machinery and remains trapped in a bizarre time-warp; experts uncover a forgotten mine where dreams of discovering a fortune were met with chaos and murder.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Mystery of the Alien Base

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghosts of the Cursed Castle

programme.title: Storage Wars: North Hollywood Hustle
programme.desc: The competition becomes fierce in North Hollywood and even Dan and Laura can't escape the tension. Dave scores a locker that may be a hit and Rene fights past the local buyers to have some fun.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Who Let the Daves Out
programme.desc: The buyers hit a vault auction in Huntington Beach where Dave decides to bring a few friends to help him out. Mary struggles to win a vault and keep her inexperience under wraps.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock and Roll
programme.desc: An auction in Mission Hills brings new challenges as Ivy changes his game and goes for a locker with collectables. Mary just tries to land something that will give her a quick sale.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Gambler of Thrones
programme.desc: The buyers head out to Palm Springs for an auction that brings sweet lockers and big money finds. Mary is worried that they area may be too high society for her, while Ivy sets his sights on vintage items.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Too Fast, Too Curious
programme.desc: Dave finds something that has him baffled while Ivy attempts an elusive strategy to make a score.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Once Upon a Locker in the West
programme.desc: The buyers head to Santa Ana, CA where dreams of great lockers spice up the auction. Jarrod and Brandi get a locker that leads to the sweet life while Mary tries to get something more collectable.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Locker Mountain High
programme.desc: The auctions begin in Upland, California, but Dan and Laura take the buyers on a wild ride to finish out the day. Ivy ends up with an eyeful, and Mary buys early in hopes of treasure.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fontan-o-rama

programme.desc: Bellflower, CA hosts an auction that has high stakes and big money finds. Ivy struggles through a bad buy to find something of value, while Dave tries to find trash among the treasure. Jarrod buys a unit that becomes a horror show for Brandi.

programme.desc: Brandi does her best to stay positive for Jarrod, while Dave is out for blood.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Parks and Wreck
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes as the guys cannonball into an uncomfortable poolside encounter. Tonight's loser presents a shocking senior citizen initiative to a community planning board.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hopeless and Changeless
programme.desc: The guys head to the park asking strangers to agree with their bizarre points of view. Plus, Murr finds himself in a harrowing race to the finish at the track, learn how he barely escaped with his life via golf cart.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Below the Belt
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q put their sword wielding skills to the test while teaching fencing, and one joker is especially 'en garde' when he faces an Olympian. Plus, the guys trim away their dignity while posing as fabulous hairstylists at a salon.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady
programme.desc: Find out how long Q was 'sleeping' before the guys decided to have him stay asleep for 30 minutes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: The amount of times Joe showed his butt on the show. Why the volunteers were turned away for Tool Bag.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Soup's On Episode
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Murr and Sal dine and discuss their lives. Find out what's on the menu and whether they'll ever actually cook tenderloin.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Breakfast Foods Episode
programme.desc: Join the guys for another fun glimpse at their lives direct from their home. The fans decide what's on tonight's menu.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.desc: Embarking on a group trip to Amsterdam, several of the ladies attend David Foster's annual charity gala in Canada where Kim confronts Lisa Rinna over talking behind her back. When the women arrive in Amsterdam, anger flares between the Richards sisters.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Amster-Damn!
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, tensions continue to run high between Kim and Lisa Rinna, culminating in a shocking and explosive dinner that leaves Kyle fleeing the scene. Several of the ladies enjoy the local 'space cakes' until Brandi unexpectedly explodes at Kyle.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Amster-damn Slap
programme.desc: With tensions still high, the ladies start day three in Amsterdam by splitting into two groups to explore the city. Eileen confronts Lisa Rinna about Lisa's failure to support her in front of Kim. Later, all of the unresolved issues come to a head.

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: An Evening in Provence: Lance Bass and Vivica A. Fox
programme.desc: Lisa transports her best friend Lance Bass and actress Vivica A. Fox to the South of France with a Provence-themed party — and serial prankster Lance gets a taste of his own medicine.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Truckin' Good Time
programme.desc: Julie bites off more than she can chew when she agrees to make desserts for a food truck event. Meanwhile, Grayson gets a lesson from Todd about what it means to be truly sorry.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Granny's Gone Wild
programme.desc: Faye threatens to move back to Atlanta after being upset by Todd. Meanwhile, Julie struggles to get Grayson ready to start his new school.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Baking Bad
programme.desc: Julie and Faye battle over who will host the Chrisley family Thanksgiving dinner. Meanwhile, Todd struggles to find a cure for his insomnia.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Pitch Perfection
programme.desc: Todd is determined to win when the Rawlings come to town to compete in local family fun day. And Chase and Savannah help Grayson prepare a pitch for his new YouTube Channel.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Bringing Up Baby

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Ready to Launch
programme.desc: The Chrisleys head to Tampa for Savannah's fashion line launch at HSN. Todd and Julie help Savannah overcome her on air jitters, and Nanny gets Chase in trouble at a casino.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Training Faye
programme.desc: Julie gets frustrated when the family use Chloe's birthday as a reason to compete against each other. Nanny Faye gets more than she bargained for when Todd insists on being her trainer.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd and Pony Show
programme.desc: Todd becomes Faye's assistant after finding out that she's been making Julie to run all of her errands. Meanwhile, Savannah gets over-excited when Chloe shows an interest in horseback riding.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: A Date with Destiny
programme.desc: A newly single Chase gets caught off guard when his family sets him up on a double blind date. Meanwhile, Todd struggles with how to handle Grayson's latest homework assignment.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Biddy Battle
programme.desc: Todd finds himself in the middle of an old biddy battle when Frances moves in with Faye while Grayson attempts to break a world record.

programme.title: Chopped: Midnight Snack Attack
programme.desc: The four chefs in this special competition are tasked with making the perfect midnight meal. In the first round, fried foods and a trendy cocktail are creatively reimagined in appetizers.

programme.title: Chopped: Hangry Baskets: Dumped
programme.desc: Hangry baskets are back for a battle featuring foods for the broken hearted. In the first round, the chefs must incorporate the post-breakup standbys wine and chocolate, and a nostalgic treat keeps the competitors on their toes in round two.

programme.title: Chopped: Bar Fight
programme.desc: Four bartenders who love to cook compete in this special competition to prove that barkeeps know how to keep the flavors coming. An outrageous cocktail is the centerpiece of a fun first basket.

programme.title: Chopped: So Sumac Me!
programme.desc: Four enthusiastic chefs are up to the challenge as they attempt to outsmart the baskets in a race against the clock. Minced meat and something sweet are part of the appetizer round puzzle.

programme.title: Chopped: Hangry Baskets: Hungover
programme.desc: This battle is packed with must-have ingredients for a hangover. A greasy favorite and soupy carbs get the chefs' creative juices flowing in the first round. The final competitors must transform a tried-and-true hangover snack into a scrumptious dessert.

programme.title: Chopped: Smokin' Skills
programme.desc: The chefs are excited to face smoked-food challenges requiring them to make delicious modern dishes with the ancient cooking method. The chefs left standing at the end must make do with a fishy candy in the dessert round.

programme.title: Chopped: Skilfish Coping Skills
programme.desc: The competing chefs are in for a surprise when they open the appetizer basket to find a peculiar pate. In round two, the competitors must work with a fish that they've never cooked before.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Spring Feast
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes a delicious farm spread to celebrate the arrival of spring with her family. She's making homemade herbed pasta with feta, lemon and pine nuts, hearty meatballs with garlic yogurt and chimichurri, and spring apple and fennel salad.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Taco Night Twist
programme.desc: Molly Yeh treats her girlfriends to a taco night done Pizza Friday style. Her menu includes taco pizza Al Pastor with tomatillo salsa and avocado cucumber salad served alongside watermelon agua fresca.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Middle Italy
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's old band stops by the farm for a home-cooked meal. For her music-loving friends, Molly makes Orecchiette with broccolini and sausage, and a simple escarole salad with artichokes and tangy lemon dressing.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Fun Italian Feast
programme.desc: Molly Yeh whips up a fun Italian feast for the whole family, starting with her cheesy smashed meatball burgers. She also makes a colorful antipasto salad with prosciutto-wrapped breadsticks, a crispy parmesan fried onion and spumoni cake jars for dessert.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Burning 101
programme.desc: Ladd's out burning the pastures and Ree Drummond has some hungry mouths to feed! She takes care of two days' worth of dinners with Spicy Jerk Chicken and Steak and Bean Burritos, along with a crunchy Corn Salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Deli Food Showdown
programme.desc: Ree's testing recipes for her deli and having her friends pick which versions will end up on the menu. First, her basic chicken salad with grapes is up against a delicious curried chicken salad with raisins.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16 Minute Dinners
programme.desc: It's time for evening meals in Ree Drummond's 16-minute frontier fast lane! First up are speedy shrimp tacos with slaw and fixings, then pork chops with wine and garlic comes with a side of zesty lemony green beans.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cowboy Drive-Through
programme.desc: Ree serves up sensational packed lunches at the Drummond drive-through. She makes ranch hand sandwiches with pop pulled pork and fixins, spicy sweet potato chips, a cowboy fruit salad and triple-chocolate cow pies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Easy Entertaining
programme.desc: Ree hosts a cooking and eating get-together with her Oklahoma City Thunder friends. The menu includes white spinach artichoke lasagna and a butternut kale salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: 16-Minute Chicken Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making 16-minute chicken dinners in a race against time. She starts with chicken fajita pasta, followed by honey plum soy stir fry. Cutlets make an amazing spicy chicken sandwich, and there's a shortcut in the green goddess chicken salad.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Food Network Star Showdown

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guilty Pleasures

programme.desc: A sister who is trying to help sell her brother's property has had no luck finding a buyer. Lyndsay and Leslie come to the rescue by updating the small starter home with Scandinavian design elements and an outdoor oasis that's perfect for entertaining.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Pop Quiz: No Appeal to Curb Appeal
programme.desc: A couple that's desperate to sell their bungalow after receiving no offers calls on real estate experts and twins Leslie and Lyndsay. The home needs some love to make it sellable, but the stakes are raised when the twins invest money to make improvements.

programme.title: House Hunters: Colorado Farmhouse Rock
programme.desc: A Colorado couple is looking for more acreage and privacy just outside of the Denver area. They play in a popular '80s tribute band, so they need to find a house in the country that's a close drive to the city.

programme.title: House Hunters: Seeking in Cincy
programme.desc: A job transfer to Cincinnati, Ohio, has a young couple seeking a new home. While she dreams of a Tudor-style home with steeple roofs and tons of character, he's hoping for a Craftsman that doesn't need any renovation.

programme.title: House Hunters: Modern vs. Historic in South Carolina
programme.desc: Buyers are on the hunt for a second home in Charleston, South Carolina. She wants quintessential Southern charm in the heart of the historic district, but he's looking for a cool contemporary vibe in more trendy, up-and-coming areas.

programme.title: House Hunters: Iowa 'Famcave'
programme.desc: She wants a brand-new, practical home that fits their growing family, but he wants an older historical place.

programme.title: Good Bones: A Neighborhood Eyesore That's Horrible Before Becomes an Amazing After
programme.desc: After purchasing a house from the city for only $4,000, Mina and Karen know they might have a lot of work in front of them. They discover detrimental water damage, horrific smells and questionable water lines.

programme.title: Good Bones: Abandoned Partially Built Home Gets Rescued
programme.desc: Mina and Karen transform a deserted new build into a fun and playful home.

programme.title: Good Bones: Little White House on a Hill
programme.desc: Mina and Karen buy a little white house on a hill with potential to be a real charmer in the Bates-Hendricks neighbourhood. The home has a great floor plan but it has serious foundation issues and is in desperate need of a facelift.

programme.title: Good Bones: Old Doors, New Wall
programme.desc: Mina and Karen work on a duplex unit that's riddled with trash and interesting surprises, including a wall made entirely out of old doors. However, further problems arise when Cory discovers a foundation issue no one saw coming.

programme.title: Good Bones: Updated Victorian in Old Southside
programme.desc: Mina and Karen have their work cut out for them as they turn a trash-filled home into an updated Victorian beauty.

programme.title: Good Bones: The Greenwich Village Townhome
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are back in Old Southside renovating the right side of their duplex townhomes. Karen also has a major announcement about her position within the company and the ramifications of that change come to light sooner than expected.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Marrying the Old and the New
programme.desc: Drew and Jonathan overhaul an entry, living room, dining room and kitchen, leaving the family with a home they can love for years to come.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Keep the Charm, Not the Layout
programme.desc: Since buying their Las Vegas house as newlyweds, a couple's charming home is bursting at the seams with the addition of two kids and a mother-in-law. The home's vintage character is part of its charm but the old-school layout simply no longer works.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Forty-Year Home
programme.desc: A couple bought their home when their daughter was born and the couple before them lived there for 40 years. With the recent arrival of another baby, they're learning that the closed-off layout and lack of storage isn't working for their growing family.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Family Heirloom Home
programme.desc: Nicole's grandfather built their home in the 1950's and it's been passed down in her family from generation to generation. The home is rich with history and Nicole and her husband are thrilled to be able to raise their kids in the home she grew up in.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: A veteran, cancer survivor and mother of two looking for a fresh start purchased a home with warm, positive energy, but it is far from perfect. Drew and Jonathan help overhaul the space to transform the house into the balanced sanctuary of her dreams.

programme.title: Movie: Erasing His Dark Past
programme.desc: A woman's husband is presumed dead, but when she tries to get his affairs in order she discovers he was not the man she thought. When he turns up alive having faked his own death, he kidnaps her daughter and forces her to find a way to escape.

programme.title: Movie: Jodi Arias: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Jodi Arias, a seductive aspiring photographer recently found guilty of killing her former lover, Travis Alexander, who was found nude in his home shower with a slit throat, 27 stab wounds and a bullet to the head.

programme.desc: Grandma Madea is mischievous and impulsive with a few anger control issues. After a high-speed chase and appearing in front of a judge, she finds herself in jail with a variety of interesting characters.

programme.title: Movie: Kidnap
programme.desc: A single mother takes her son to an amusement park where he gets abducted. She goes to the police, but realizes that she doesn't have the time to wait for their help. Taking her son's safety into her own hands, she pursues the abductor relentlessly.

programme.title: Below Deck: It Ain't Easy Being Green

programme.title: Below Deck: Jesus Saves

programme.title: Below Deck: Cool Beans

programme.desc: Nico is pushed to his breaking point under the leadership of boson EJ. Matt continues to unravel after his date with Brianna which causes problems for Kate. Captain Lee makes a staffing decision. Jen feels under-appreciated in her department.

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Mega Snack Countdown

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Mega Food Countdown

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Mega Machine Countdown
programme.desc: Awe-Inspiring Machines, featuring the top ten mightiest, strangest, and most unique innovations from our archives.

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Food: Snacks

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Tabar-Shishpar

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Extreme Measures

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: The Dogs of War

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Lift Off

programme.desc: Reagan's business mandate leads to a new breed of entrepreneurs, including Steve Jobs, whose '1984' ad helped launch the Super Bowl commercial craze and Ted Turner, who invented the 24-hour news network.

programme.title: '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Shop 'Til You Drop
programme.desc: Nonstop glamour and excess find a new poster girl in the 1980s when Madonna creates her own brand inspiring young girls everywhere. Young men with money to burn buy into the yuppie lifestyle and check out the latest expensive gadget: the cell phone.

programme.title: '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: Traders on Wall Street mirror the movie with insider trading and drug use. CEOs see their salaries skyrocket while women try to overcome the boys' clubs. NASA's space shuttle Challenger explodes during takeoff.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Tear Down These Walls
programme.desc: Though the 1980s were known for its 'greed is good' mantra, the decade also saw its fair share of literal and cultural walls brought down, as Americans united on political, racial and health issues.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Super Power
programme.desc: At the end of the 1980s American pop culture goes global and helps bring down the Iron Curtain, leaving America as the world's sole superpower.

programme.title: Tiny House Nation: 300 Sq. Ft. Retro Garage House
programme.desc: Military man and family ready to retire want a house they can call home and watch their two young daughters grow up. Stacy has a love for retro while Jose is hoping for man cave to work on cars and room for their girls.

programme.title: Unlikely Animal Friends: Big Love
programme.desc: This series features stories of bonds between two animals of different species.

programme.title: Unlikely Animal Friends: The Fox and the Hound
programme.desc: Heart-warming stories of animal friends.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: From the operating room to the wilds, teams at the Columbus Zoo are ready for anything.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Mandrill of the House
programme.desc: A monkey shows its true colors and a gigantic female bison gets a check-up.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: The Otter Limits
programme.desc: The team teaches baby otters to swim before they make their television debut.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Strangeglove
programme.desc: The staff of Pol Vet Services has one head scratcher after another, from the peculiar to the downright bizarre. With over 19,000 clients, it's only a matter of time before the vets are presented with a unique case that they've never seen before.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pup-Pup-Hooray!
programme.desc: From constipated canines to nasty dogfights, these pups have seen better days.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: One Great Dane
programme.desc: It’s an emotional time for the Pols as they say farewell to their beloved Great Dane, Frija.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Piggin' Out
programme.desc: Things get a little saucy after Dr. Pol is asked to be a judge at the Hearty Harvest Chili Cook Off.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Operation Skunk
programme.desc: It’s a busy day at Dr. K’s with two injured parrots, an emaciated ferret and more.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: The Pharaoh's Darkest Secrets
programme.desc: The first female pharaoh of ancient Egyptian assumed a sinister alter ego and continues to be shrouded in mystery; experts align advanced archaeological science with the latest discoveries to reveal the dark secrets behind this matriarchal reign.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Rituals of the Pagan Nazis
programme.desc: From the uniforms to the use of the Swastika, a large component of the Nazi mythology was heavily influenced by the Occult; experts investigate how the Nazi party attempted to shape their political ideology with mystical pagan beliefs and rituals.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Nazi Quest for Holy Relics
programme.desc: As the Nazi war machine tore through Europe, they plundered museums in search of holy relics that would grant them untold power and prestige. experts investigate how close Hitler was to discovering the Holy Grail and its promise of eternal life.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Crocodile Queen
programme.desc: The Crocodile Queen was Egypt's first female pharaoh, but we don't who she was, or why she took this sinister alter-ego. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Rituals of the Pagan Nazis
programme.desc: From the uniforms to the use of the Swastika, a large component of the Nazi mythology was heavily influenced by the Occult; experts investigate how the Nazi party attempted to shape their political ideology with mystical pagan beliefs and rituals.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Nazi Quest for Holy Relics
programme.desc: As the Nazi war machine tore through Europe, they plundered museums in search of holy relics that would grant them untold power and prestige. experts investigate how close Hitler was to discovering the Holy Grail and its promise of eternal life.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Gladiator Graveyard
programme.desc: When a mass grave of mutilated skeletons is unearthed at the frontier of the Roman Empire, experts use advanced digital analysis to reveal the mystery behind these grisly remains.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Planet 9
programme.desc: Scientists have discovered a mysterious ninth planet on the very edge of our solar system. Ten times the size of Earth, this strange world could have moons with extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Expanded Edition: First Second
programme.desc: Travel back to the first second of the universe's existence with the latest science and information.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Did the Big Bang Really Happen?
programme.desc: New discoveries are causing astronomers to question if the Big Bang really happened, and using the latest science, they investigate if it wasn't just the start of our universe but many mysterious multiverses.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Evidence
programme.desc: The discovery of extraterrestrial life might face an impossible challenge: the physics of the universe itself. Using cutting-edge technology, experts might be on the verge of a groundbreaking find and the evidence could already be in hand.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Life and Death on the Red Planet
programme.desc: Life once existed on Mars, but a series of devastating mass extinctions have made present-day life nearly impossible. The latest science shows how Martian life keeps bouncing back as it transforms from a blue watery world like Earth into a desert planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Are Black Holes Real?
programme.desc: New discoveries challenge everything we know about black holes, and astronomers question if they even exist; the latest science tries to explain how they work and what they look like.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dark History of the Solar System
programme.desc: Our solar system hides a dark and violent past, and new discoveries reveal that Earth and the planets were formed from the destruction of strange alien worlds that came before us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Starman
programme.desc: Some day life on Earth will be made impossible due to a cosmic disaster. In order for humanity to survive, we nee to find a new home among the stars. Science is already exploring ways to take us there.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Death of the Last Stars
programme.desc: Our universe's stars are dying off faster than new ones are born, and using the latest technology, experts investigate the secrets of the last stars of the cosmos and what this stellar apocalypse means for life on earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strange Lives of Dwarf Planets
programme.desc: Our solar system is home to hundreds of strange, tiny worlds called dwarf planets, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monster Black Hole
programme.desc: Black holes are the least understood places in the universe, where the rules of physics collapse. We go inside the supermassive black hole in the center of the Milky Way to uncover terrifying secrets about parallel universes, wormholes, and space-time.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: NASA's Journey to Mars
programme.desc: NASA is on a mission to send humans to Mars within just 15 years, but to reach this next frontier of space exploration, experts must discover brand-new technology and cutting-edge science that protects astronauts from the Red Planet's deadliest killers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Fractured Glass
programme.desc: When affable ladies' man Michael Tittemore is gunned down in the dead of night, Kenda first sets his sights on the roommates who were present during the murder. But a shocking revelation will turn his attention to a far more nefarious band of suspects.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Primal Instinct
programme.desc: When a drunken dispute at a biker bar turns deadly, Kenda must launch a manhunt for a pair of suspects who fled with a small boy in tow. Then a man is murdered in an onslaught of high caliber gunfire, but an unexpected break turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Last Fare
programme.desc: A young man is found dead behind the wheel of his taxi. With robbery seeming unlikely, Kenda and Gaenzle wonder if this was personal. Could this stem from a dispute at his other job as a radio DJ? A failing marriage? The possibilities seem endless.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Way Out
programme.desc: An investigation into the missing persons case of 13-year-old Jessyca Mullenberg.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Guns and Secrets
programme.desc: One young woman is found with a shotgun wound to her head shortly after moving in with her new boyfriend. Then, a couple planning their wedding are gunned down in their own backyard.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: In Her Own Home
programme.desc: A beautiful college student is found stabbed to death in her bed. Police immediately find the murder weapon and an eyewitness, but the case stalls. And, another beloved young woman is bludgeoned to death in her home.

programme.title: Shattered: The Green Light
programme.desc: In 1991, a single mother takes her daughter to a busy electronics store to buy a boom box. Nearly nine hours later, she walks out as a battered survivor of one of the largest hostage crises in U.S. history.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Guns and Secrets
programme.desc: One young woman is found with a shotgun wound to her head shortly after moving in with her new boyfriend. Then, a couple planning their wedding are gunned down in their own backyard.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: In Her Own Home
programme.desc: A beautiful college student is found stabbed to death in her bed. Police immediately find the murder weapon and an eyewitness, but the case stalls. And, another beloved young woman is bludgeoned to death in her home.

programme.title: Shattered: The Green Light
programme.desc: In 1991, a single mother takes her daughter to a busy electronics store to buy a boom box. Nearly nine hours later, she walks out as a battered survivor of one of the largest hostage crises in U.S. history.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Way Out
programme.desc: An investigation into the missing persons case of 13-year-old Jessyca Mullenberg.

programme.title: Who Killed Jane Doe?: The Doe in the Desert
programme.desc: Ranch hands searching a remote pasture for coyotes killing sheep find the victim of a different predator: a woman dead in a roadside ditch. Meanwhile, a young mother goes missing. Both cases go cold before revealing the secret... of Who Killed Jane Doe.

programme.title: Who Killed Jane Doe?: A Girl Has No Name
programme.desc: The Apple Valley in California's Mojave Desert keeps secrets well hidden. A body of an unidentified Jane Doe is discovered there in 1994, but it will take nearly two decades to discovery all of the passion, jealousy and drama that led to her death.

programme.title: Unbreakable: Live to Tell: Dad's Garage
programme.desc: When a well-known mechanic is diagnosed with diabetes, his son LJ Bobish wonders how they will be able to make ends meet. Soon, secret meetings held out in the family's garage lead to a surprise visit from someone with a fatal score to settle.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: The Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: Karen Pannell has wonderful friends, family and a loving boyfriend. Yet when she is found murdered, the brutality indicates the killer was close to her. As Police try to uncover who could have wanted her dead, they find a clue written by Karen herself.

programme.title: Blood Runs Cold: In the Cards
programme.desc: When a young mother is found dead in her car on New Year's Day, there's little evidence for cops to go on. Her case languishes for nearly two decades until her sister teams up with a rookie cop and the pair set out to catch the killer.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Into the Woods
programme.desc: When Kathey Horn disappears, some believe she's following the Grateful Dead. Others think she was sacrificed during a Wicca initiation. Her mom wonders if she's run off with an older boyfriend. The man with the van knows what happened to Kathey.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: Killer Colleagues
programme.desc: Zoe Pulver and Jane Long have great jobs working for Ashley Pollow, a talented tax attorney in Florida. But Ashley also has a violent temper, and when a grisly murder takes place at the office, Jane and Zoe find themselves way too close to the killer.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: Star-Crossed Murder
programme.desc: Air traffic controller Gene Thurnau moves to St-Petersburg, Florida, to start over. He meets Jaye-Jaye, and soon they marry and begin building their dream home. But ghosts from Gene's past bring unwanted tension and horror into their perfect home.

programme.title: Predator at Large: We're Talking About A Serial Killer
programme.desc: When a pregnant woman and her infant son vanish on a walk to their local corner store, the close-knit town of Deerfield Beach is terrified. When the woman turns up dead, the community is convinced that they have a killer living in their midst.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Deadly Daughter
programme.desc: She spent 11 years in prison. But did Noura Jackson really murder her mother? The one-time party girl speaks out about the evidence that put her behind bars, the court decision that set her free, and suspicions that turned her own family against her.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Bound By Blood
programme.desc: The busy streets of Atlanta, GA are shaken as horror of the 'Necktie Killer' strikes the city with fear. Detectives from neighboring counties piece together correlative clues and distinctive apparel left behind at each crime scene.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Taken in Tennessee
programme.desc: In 2011, 20-year-old Holly Bobo was abducted from her home in rural Tennessee. A search turned up some of her personal items, including her cell phone. But Holly was gone. The trail went cold for two years until a hunter made a gruesome find.

programme.title: Dead Silent: When a Stranger Knocks
programme.desc: After fleeing her troubled marriage, Deborah Brown and her kids seek refuge at her brother's house in rustic Lebanon, Maine. But when a stranger shows up in the dead of night seeking help, neither Deborah nor her family are prepared for what happens next.

programme.title: Iran Hostage Crisis: As We Watched
programme.desc: In this riveting hour we relive the high stakes drama of the Iran hostage crisis, from the terrifying moment when the American embassy is seized on November 4th, 1979, to the last minute negotiations that freed the hostages 444 days later.

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Booze and Bullets
programme.desc: Our memories of the roaring twenties and lawless thirties are more myth than truth. Learn the shocking realities about prohibition and that rogue's gallery of gangsters including John Dillinger and Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The New World
programme.desc: There is more to the explorers who discovered America than we have been told. Learn that Christopher Columbus never stepped foot in North America and Hernán Cortés didn't defeat the Aztecs by himself.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Beautiful Samurai
programme.desc: In 12th Century Japan, a female samurai humiliates all the others. As lethal as she was lovely, Tomoe Gozen defeated the finest swordsmen, battled tyranny and was innovative on the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Killer Views
programme.desc: A family of four build their dream home overlooking the Atlantic Ocean on the eastern most point in the United States in Lubec, Maine. Later, a pro snowboarder and his wife prepare to move from their yurt in Whitefish to build their off-grid home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: An adventurous couple builds a home with self-sustaining features near the Ozark National Forest. While they both have renovation experience, building on the dangerous mountainside terrain in a location plagued by flash foods will be a challenge.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state. Mother Nature and bleeding edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Minor Finds, Major Fixes
programme.desc: Tony and Annamaria are finding their small bungalow cold and drafty, despite a positive inspection report.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Bigger Bungle
programme.desc: Anna and Terry traded in their starter bungalow for a larger one. Now the front porch that attracted them to the home is falling apart and fixing the grading issue, as the home inspector suggested, went way over budget.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Below Grade
programme.desc: Vishal is caught between Jaime's needs, and those of his mom. A home inspector lets them all down. Mike Holmes, Damon and the crew will come to the rescue.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Steamed
programme.desc: Paul and Anca felt lucky to find this townhouse for their blended family but are worried about what their home inspector did not see.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Splitting Up Jobs
programme.desc: Robert sends Tay and Grayson to salvage in Salem, Virginia, until the crew comes together to help finish the job. Mike and Ted travel to Norfolk, Virginia, to pick up a special nautical structure for a client.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Calamity
programme.desc: Nicole is hired by one of her clients to rehab his cluttered, compact kitchen into a useable, restored space for his family.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bathroom Beautification
programme.desc: Nicole takes on another design project while waiting for the Minnehaha house to sell. This time it's her client's colourful sea themed bathroom that needs fixing.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Garage Door Greatness
programme.desc: With the Minnehaha house still sitting on the market, Nicole decides to put her own house up for sale in hopes that it will sell faster. But before she can do this she gives her garage a much-needed makeover and removes asbestos from her basement.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Unfinished-Finished Basement
programme.desc: Preparing to put her house up for sale, Nicole turns her attention to the cluttered basement and devises a plan to update the space while also keeping the unfinished, industrial feel it would have had when the house was built.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Revamp
programme.desc: Nicole repairs the hardwood floors in both living rooms of the Harriet Project and searches for replica tile to begin restoring a fireplace in the downstairs unit.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Finished Project
programme.desc: With only a few weeks left to finish the Harriet Project, Nicole and the homeowners divide and conquer to complete the lower unit's living room and kitchen. Nicole visits a local high school shop class to work on a radiator cover for the living room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Faulty Foundation
programme.desc: A bachelor's dark dining and living room are opened up and become one modern lounge. What was once dirty-carpeted living room with college dorm furniture and a separate ugly dining room gets completely transformed into one hip wine room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bugs, Birds and Bad Plumbing
programme.desc: Moving to the interior of the Dollar House, host and interior designer Nicole Curtis demolishes her heart out and focuses on the disgusting kitchen space as well as adding a half bathroom to the first floor, evicting a few pigeons along the way.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Mantle to Remember
programme.desc: Restoring the first floor of the Dollar House continues as host and designer Nicole Curtis uncovers hardwood floors throughout the living and dining room areas. The dining room hutch is still intact, but there is a whole new fireplace mantle to build.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bathroom Rebuild
programme.desc: Heading up to the second floor, Nicole takes on the bathroom, one of the house's dirtiest and grimiest rooms. She brings it down to the studs, adding clean lines with white subway tile and re-purposes an old dresser into one of her signature vanities.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Rustic English Re-tree-t
programme.desc: Pete and his team embark on a quest to an idyllic farm in Waxhaw, NC with orders to craft an elegant English retreat with a hanging bed fit for a queen. But one thing might stand in the way of Pete and his holy grail of pastoral treehouse builds, goats!

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Frank Lloyd Lakehouse
programme.desc: Pete and the crew channel Frank Lloyd Wright for a triple-decker treehouse on the shores of Lake Barkley in Kentucky.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Mindbending Silver Maple
programme.desc: Inspired by tales of a time long past, Pete builds a treehouse cradled by the stems of a twisty silver maple on the shore of Lake Chelan. The cedar-shingled structure has a curved turret that soars two storeys high and a deck to take in views of the lake.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Home Tree Home
programme.desc: A treehouse escape grows into a full-time live-in treehouse when Pete lays eyes on the gargantuan Sitka spruce of his dreams for a hexagonal build on the coast of Oregon.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Glamorous Glamping Retreat
programme.desc: The team leaves their tents behind and head to New Jersey to build a campers retreat for an outdoor-loving couple. With a screened-in porch, a floating barbecue deck, and a cozy hanging bed, this Adirondack style tree-cabin puts glamping in the trees.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Taste of Texas
programme.desc: The smoke signals lead Roger to two popular food trucks in Texas serving up delicious ethnic eats. In Grapevine, Texas, Roger meets Pit Master Trey Sánchez of Vaqueros Bar-B-Q who is known for combining authentic Texas-style barbecue with Mexican dishes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hawaiian Heat and Texas Meat
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Aloha State where Chef Lee Anne Wong fires up a custom-made stainless-steel shelving unit with local kiawe wood and prepares a tropical feast of succulent beer-can chicken, slow-roasted fruits and vegetables.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Boise, ID
programme.desc: Casey Webb ventures to beautiful Boise, Idaho, for a sushi and soup challenge so diabolically spicy, it goes by the name of Demon's Delight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Dangerously Good Eats
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a burger in Memphis, Tenn., that's so dangerously good, innocent bystanders had better beware! Then pizza gets a brunch makeover in Atlanta with creamy scrambled eggs and crispy pancetta.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beastly Burgers
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets things started in Boston where a whole smoked hog is getting the royal treatment with a marinade injection, a salt crust and a foil wrap for crispy skin. Then in Phoenix, a wolf of a burger gets topped with smoked pulled pork.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beers, Burgers and Bocce in Baltimore
programme.desc: Actor and proud Baltimore native Josh Charles meets up with Michael at his favourite place for crab cakes in a town where everyone fights over where to find the very best. Then, they have a heated round of bocce ball in the Little Italy neighborhood.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Smoked, Stuffed and Frozen Finds
programme.desc: Chef Brad Miller visits an Orange County food truck with a custom smoker on board. Then he heads to Austin, Texas, to try classic Cajun dishes with a twist. Finally, in Los Angeles, he discovers an ice cream truck without a freezer.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Cheesy, Fresh And Fried
programme.desc: Food truck aficionado chef Brad Miller starts off in Durham, N.C., with a visit to American Meltdown, a food truck where chef Paul Inserra is surprising customers with his innovative and mouthwatering spins on the classic grilled cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Cream of the Crop
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his day in Louisville, KY., by cutting into a towering stack of thick hot chocolate pancakes. Lunchtime in Louisville means a saucy Mata Hari hot brown.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: All Aboard In Chat-Town
programme.desc: Ali Khan is looking for the best deals in Chattanooga, starting with a glorious colossal cinnamon roll before he digs into an out-of-this-world sweet and sassy lamb burger for lunch.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Culinary Cornhuskers
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his Omaha food adventure with breakfast from a fast made-from-scratch joint offering a crazy good egg boat with hash browns. For lunch, Ali tips his hat to an iconic Omaha lunch with a housemade Reuben.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Far From The Farm
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his day in Des Moines the way Iowans do, with crisp and cheesy breakfast nachos. Then it's onto a roasted chicken lunch with comforting mashed potatoes and onion rings, before snacking on a truly divine Napoleon.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations: Thailand
programme.desc: Thai cuisine blends five fundamental flavours: sweet, spicy, sour, bitter and salty.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago Neighborhoods
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the neighborhoods that make Chicago a culinary treasure trove. From handcrafted burgers in the West Loop to street-style tacos in Wicker Park and barbecue chicken served up in Bronzeville.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mexico City
programme.desc: Mexico City has the most people of any city in the western hemisphere, and they all love to eat. Home to some of the best street food on Earth, Andrew Zimmern explores tasty traditions like barbacoa, chicharrone and huarache.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London
programme.desc: London, England, is a multicultural melting pot, and Andrew Zimmern explores the dishes that have stayed the test of time: from the traditional Sunday roast and Yorkshire pudding to the classic pies 'n' mash and fish 'n' chips.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Warsaw
programme.desc: In Poland's capital city of Warsaw, the Slavic culture is rich and the hearty food sticks with you through the winter. From pierogi to zapiekanka to paczki, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that Poles hold as tradition.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Desserts to Die For
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the most delectable, distinctive and to-die-for dessert dishes around. They have the power to take diners back in time, back home or even to places they've never been before.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Serious Sandwiches
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shows off the most scrumptious and seriously stunning sandwiches ever created. These shockers prove that there are truly no limits to what can be placed between two slices of bread.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Back to School
programme.desc: We're going back to school to learn once and for all what the ultimate nostalgic dish is. We're joining Chef Beau MacMillan in the cafeteria with his Supreme Boffa super-sub sandwich.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Layers Of Goodness
programme.desc: Get ready to pile it on thick as we're talking layers of goodness that are stacked to the ceiling. We take a trip to Chicago where we meet up with Jeff Mauro to discover all the magic colors hidden inside the rainbow cake.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Hole Truth (Donuts)
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes us on a trip to Memphis to honor the original glazed doughnut that started it all.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: I'll Have What They're Having
programme.desc: Antonia Lofaso falls in love with a sourdough cinnamon roll in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Symon's Cleveland 'que
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, Ohio, at his very own restaurant where he enjoys a tender, juicy and hulking pastrami beef rib and a gets a special look at his grandfather's recipe for scratch-made spaetzle and spicy sauerkraut.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet Treats and Savory Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with triple-processed pork belly that's cured, brined and smoked to meaty perfection. In Seattle, tender braised lamb shoulder amps up a traditional breakfast hash.

programme.desc: Ronnie Anne tries to convince her Dad to move to the city with the help of Sid.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fool's Gold/ Flight Plan
programme.desc: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa’s gold./ Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl, Cj and Carlitos try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Write Stuff/ Racing Hearts
programme.desc: When Lucy quits the writing club at school due to the by-the-books way Huggins runs the club, Mom takes over. When Luna and Sam embark on a challenge taking place across Royal Woods, they discover they have less in common than they thought.

programme.title: The Loud House: Everybody Loves Leni/ Middle Men
programme.desc: Torn between her work friends and her school friends, Leni tries to bring everyone together. When Lincoln and Clyde go to tour the middle school, Lynn gives them some questionable advice.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Munk Man/ Ride Along
programme.desc: Simon creates a Super Hero costume for a convention he's attending. When Alvin's bicycle is stolen, he joins forces with Officer Dangus to solve the case.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Missing Miss Smith/ Monster Madness
programme.desc: When Alvin finally pushes Miss Smith too far, she quits and her replacement is a nightmare. Alvin and Simon tease The Chipettes about being scared by a movie.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape from the ImpossiBin!
programme.desc: With F.O.W.L. at their heels, Scrooge tests out the Money Bin’s deadly new security system on Louie and Della, while Beakley and Webby train the others for an enemy attack.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hiro The Villain
programme.desc: Momakase blackmails Hiro into helping her steal her family's knives from Yama's safe.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thaddeus and Thor/ De Plane! De Plane!
programme.desc: Candace, Phineas and Ferb compete with their look-alikes; Candace goes to a party.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Klimpaloon Ultimatum
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb must help Love Handel prove the existence of Klimpaloon, or else Love Handel will be barred from the world of fact-based song writing for all time.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Sal the Big Winner
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Party Puppers
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Split Sword of Swanstantine!
programme.desc: The kids pair off to find the missing pieces of a mystical sword hidden throughout an Istanboar marketplace, unless F.O.W.L. gets to them first.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's in the House/ Minor Monogram
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb can't find Perry and decide to create the Perrytronic 3000, a mechanical structure that can assume any form.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ferb Latin/ Lotsa Latkes
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create their own language, Ferb Latin, which quickly catches on. Then, when all of the potatoes in Danville go missing, Phineas and Ferb decide to clone some using Buford's last potato chip, with unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Style/ I, Farmbot
programme.desc: When Tilly is mistaken for a baby, she searches the mall for a new look to reflect her maturity. Cricket persuades Bill to buy a farming robot in order to get out of chores.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: Angry with how the Plantar farm is being run, Sprig decides to overthrow Hop Pop. Anne is going to give Polly some long overdue girl time, whether Polly wants it or not.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Perry the Actorpus/ Bullseye!
programme.desc: When Perry wins a contest and becomes the spokesanimal for Totally Tools, his secret identity is put into jeopardy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Monster of Phineas-n-Ferbenstein/ Oil on Candace
programme.desc: Boys set off to Central America to help a Damsel in Distress Isabella.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Fast and the Phineas/ Lawn Gnome Beach Party of Terror
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb enter into a race with a 'tricked out' family car. In the meantime, Perry and Platypus try to stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from deflating everything that is inflatable in the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: For Your Ice Only/ Happy New Year
programme.desc: NHL superstar Luc Robitaille offers his assistance when Phineas and Ferb take an ice hockey game to the extreme. Phineas and Ferb plan their own New Year's Eve ball drop, complete with a customized multi-dimensional ball, while Candice makes a resolution.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mommy Can You Hear Me?/ Road Trip
programme.desc: After Candace injures her ankle and is told to stay in bed, Phineas and Ferb provide her with a box of items to stave off her boredom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ready for the Bettys/ The Flying Fishmonger
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb accidentally discover Perry's secret lair and are thrust into a spy mission of their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Tri-Stone Area/ Doof Dynasty
programme.desc: It's the Stone Age and Phineas and Ferb are cavemen who decide to invent something new, fun and useful, the wheel. In ancient feudal China, Princess Isabella is part ruler and Master Perry has given up the way of the warrior.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Oh, There You Are, Perry/ Swiss Family Phineas
programme.desc: A musical device is built to find Perry/ A trip at sea strands the family on an island.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Terrifying Tri-State Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: In the first tale, Buford breaks a rule that turns Perry into an evil facsimile. Tale two tells of Doofenshmirtz’s encounter with a floating baby head that grants cursed wishes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Interview With a Platypus/ Tip of the Day
programme.desc: Animal translator built so the boys can figure out what Perry is really trying to say.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Druselsteinoween/ Face Your Fear
programme.desc: When Doof inherits a castle in Druselstein, Vanessa moves her Halloween party to the new digs; when Vanessa asks him to babysit her pet bat, Doof has to overcome his lifelong fear of bats.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Got Game?/ Comet, Comet, Comet, Comet Kermilian
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb organize 'The F Games' for Buford and Isabella.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Persistence! Kolossal Strike!
Phineas and Ferb: The Mom Attractor/ Cranius Maximus
programme.desc: Candice asks the boys to invent a device that attracts their mom so that she can bust her brothers. In the meantime, Dr. Doofenshmirtz invents a 'Baby-Cry-Inator.' The boys invent a cerebral stimulatory hat to help Baljeet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Are You My Mummy?/ Flop Starz
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide they want their very own mummy after visiting a local Egyptian movie theatre. A reality show singing competition comes to town and the boys decide they want to become one hit wonders.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.
