programme.title: Movie: School of Rock
programme.desc: Kicked out of his rock band, flat broke and lacking any job skills whatsoever, Dewey Finn fakes his way into a job as a substitute teacher at a stuffy private school. Once there, he teaches the kids about rock and roll.

programme.title: Movie: The Eagle
programme.desc: A Roman soldier is determined to honour his dead father's memory by retrieving a lost family emblem.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: The outspoken comedian discusses hot topics.

programme.title: Movie: Rocky
programme.desc: Rocky Balboa is a small time boxer longing for the chance to prove to the world how great he can be. When he finally gets the chance to fight the heavyweight champion Apollo Creed in an exhibition match, he sees it as his only chance to make it big.

programme.title: Real Sports With Bryant Gumbel
programme.desc: Goes beyond the scores and statistics to present a critical look at the world of sports.

programme.title: Beartown
programme.desc: 'Beartown' explores the role a junior ice-hockey team has in a small community.

programme.title: Q: Into the Storm
programme.desc: Chart the journey to unmask the mastermind behind QAnon.

programme.title: Movie: The Operative
programme.desc: A young woman is called upon by Mossad to go undercover in Tehran. As time passes and information is revealed, a complex triangle of secrets is formed between her, her handler and her subject Farhad.

programme.title: Movie: Native Son
programme.desc: A young black man must navigate the seductive world of wealth and power after his is hired to chauffeur a business mogul.

programme.title: Movie: Gone
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her kidnapper has returned when her sister goes missing.

programme.title: Movie: Tolkien
programme.desc: Author J.R.R. Tolkien discovers inspiration, love and friendship during his school years.

programme.title: Movie: Beasts of the Southern Wild
programme.desc: A six-year-old girl leaves her hometown to search for her mother after her father's health crisis releases fictional creatures into the wild.

programme.title: Movie: Antwone Fisher
programme.desc: Due to a habit of starting violent altercations, a young Navy man is forced to see a psychiatrist after an outburst against a crewman. He eventually reveals a traumatic childhood and learns to overcome his painful past in a quest to find his family.

programme.title: Movie: A Hidden Life
programme.desc: A Catholic farmer refuses to fight for the Nazis.

programme.title: Movie: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: A freshman joins her university's all-girls singing group and takes on their male rivals.

programme.title: Movie: The Hundred-Foot Journey
programme.desc: A culinary prodigy and his family open an Indian restaurant in a charming French village, directly across the street from a Michelin starred French restaurant with a haughty proprietress.

programme.title: Movie: On the Basis of Sex
programme.desc: A young Ruth Bader Ginsburg challenges the gender norms of the era as she fights to achieve equal rights for all women. With an array of powerful forces opposing her, she finds strength in her loving family, especially her supportive husband.

programme.title: Movie: Green Book
programme.desc: An acclaimed black pianist hires a white man to be his driver and bodyguard for his tour of the Jim Crow south, and as they set out for the long trip they realize that they have nothing in common, but as the trip goes on they forge a strong bond.

programme.title: Movie: xXx
programme.desc: Thrill-seeker Xander Cage is recruited by the NSA to go undercover and infiltrate a Russian crime ring.

programme.title: Shameless: Survivors
programme.desc: Frank wants to pull one last heist with the old gang. Debbie struggles with the idea of change and blames Lip, while Lip and Brad find out the new owners of BornFree are in the mob.

programme.title: Movie: XXX: State of the Union
programme.desc: A former Navy Seal with a reckless streak who is serving time in a maximum-security prison just might be the nation's only hope in preventing an attack on the President of the United States.

programme.title: Movie: The Last House on the Left
programme.desc: A prison escapee and his gang are running from the police. When two young women cross their path they brutalize them, killing one and leaving the other for dead. When the gang seeks refuge from a storm, they end up at the parents' house.

programme.title: Movie: The Master
programme.desc: A Naval officer returning from war joins a cult which helps to clear his head.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: With her high school graduation coming up, a teenage girl must choose between her vampire boyfriend and her werewolf friend.

programme.title: Movie: Eighth Grade
programme.desc: An adolescent struggles to be noticed by her peers during the final week of eighth grade despite being pretty, funny and friendly. It's a tough world for newly-minted teens, especially when YouTube views and Instagram likes are the most important things.

programme.title: Movie: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: When a fashion-driven sorority girl is dumped by her boyfriend, she decides to follow him to law school. Harvard doesn't know what to do when Elle and her dog take the Ivy League institution by storm.

programme.title: Movie: Legally Blonde 2: Red, White and Blonde
programme.desc: When Elle Woods is fired from her job for expressing her concerns over animal testing, she heads to Washington, D.C. to fight for the cause. Elle tries to persuade a disillusioned representative to let her be heard in front of the legislative branch.

programme.title: Movie: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Three middle-aged college friends reunite to commiserate over their failed marriages, each woman having been dumped by her husband for a younger 'trophy wife.' They decide to combine forces to pay their ex-husbands back.

programme.title: Movie: Uptown Girls
programme.desc: A New York socialite takes a job as a precocious child's nanny in order to earn respect.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Burgess Family
programme.desc: Don't miss the continuation of Burgess family's makeover journey; from their new fitness space, to their backyard oasis, the team works hard to prepare for reveal day.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: I Like You So Much Better When You're Naked
programme.desc: After learning of Richard's drinking problem, Derek confronts him for the sake of their friendship and the hospital. Meanwhile, Izzie returns hoping to reconcile with Alex and tensions run high between Teddy, Cristina and Owen.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: State of Love and Trust
programme.desc: As Derek begins his role as interim chief, he faces a lawsuit when Bailey and Meredith's patient awakens from mid-surgery. Meanwhile, Teddy refuses to place Cristina on her service, Arizona tests Alex out in pediatrics and Mark refuses to speak to Lexie.

programme.title: The Closer: L.A. Woman
programme.desc: A businesswoman is gunned down in Hollywood; Brenda locks horns with the FBI while investigating the murder of an Iranian businessman.

programme.title: The Closer: Fatal Retraction
programme.desc: A botched murder investigation with faulty evidence is revealed after the body of a woman, believed to have been a murder victim of a death-row killer three years before, shows up in the morgue.

programme.title: The Closer: Standards and Practices
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer is murdered; an anonymous complaint for 'conduct unbecoming' is filed against Brenda.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Cashed Out
programme.desc: Det. Julio Sanchez's application to become a foster parent is jeopardized by his reactions to a particularly gruesome murder after the Major Crimes Division finds a chopped up body burned to bits in the barbecue pit of an L.A. Park.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: When a pair of British tourists get attacked during a Venice Beach robbery, L.A.'s twenty billion dollar tourist industry is threatened by an English journalist riding their tragedy to a career high.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Moral Hazard
programme.desc: After a shootout in a tow yard leaves three people dead, Major Crimes must scramble to find a disturbed man with a bag full of guns and a long list of grievances before he kills again. Meanwhile, Rusty goes against LAPD policy while looking for evidence.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Face Value
programme.desc: The good news is we have a witness to a murder. The bad news is he suffers from Prosopagnosia, commonly known as facial recognition blindness, and he can't recognize the killer. The Rizzolis prepare for a visit from their scheming cousin, Carlo.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Lethal Lover
programme.desc: When police respond to a harrowing 9-1-1 call from a man pleading for his life, they are led on the trail of a revenge plot more disturbing than the young victim’s worst nightmare.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Royalty, Romance, and Revenge
programme.desc: Jane Andrews appears to be living the dream life with her high society beau, Tom Cressman, until he’s found stabbed to death in their home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: A forensic scientist makes history when he uses material from a dentist's office to solve a 10-year-old crime involving an elderly couple that was brutally murdered during a robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Good Wife

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Innocence Defiled
programme.desc: The religious leader of a Hindu community in Texas flees after having been convicted of sexually abusing the children of his followers.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Justice Denied
programme.desc: Patty and Jerry Wetterling got a phone call in 1989 saying their son had been taken by an unknown abductor. For the past 25 years, new leads have come and gone, but they still await answers in his disappearance. Plus, scammers in Hawaii are on the run.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Burning Rage
programme.desc: Jennifer Puente is on the loose after allegedly torturing and setting her friend Moriah Gonzales on fire with her boyfriend Joe Alvarado.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: No Way Out
programme.desc: Authorities and the family of a young girl do not believe her when she tells them that she is being raped by her stepfather. A grudge fight escalates until one man shoots the other with three friends as witnesses.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Stolen Innocence
programme.desc: A father goes on the run after he rapes his 12 year-old stepdaughter for five years before she comes forward and shares the truth. Two coworkers and roommates become close and greed drives one to allegedly murder the other.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Close Encounters
programme.desc: Two strangers are dropped in one of the most dangerous African locations in the dead heat of Summer. Faced with aggressive hippos and charging elephants they quickly learn their place, but must mark their territory if they want to make it twenty-one days.

programme.title: Pig Royalty
programme.desc: Discover a competition unlike any other as families showcase pigs across Texas. These prized swine and the people who raise them are some of the fiercest contenders around, uncovering what it takes to bring home the bacon.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Spirits Are Angry
programme.desc: A haunted Colombian rainforest punishes the survivalists with threats from deadly jaguars, 300 species of snakes and relentless biting insects. However, their challenge is threatened when they don't heed the curse of the jungle.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Devil's Woods
programme.desc: The frigid Montana wilderness pushes the survivalists' partnership over the edge. As they struggle to work together, wildlife like bears and aggressive moose circle their camp. Plummeting temperatures create the need for drastic action.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Stars Against the Storm
programme.desc: All-Star survivalists Wes and Suzänne take on Ecuador's relentless rainforest. Aggressive pumas, venomous snakes and constant storms make every step dangerous. Even these veterans are not prepared for the shocking news that shakes their challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Mile-High Clubbed
programme.desc: The mile-high altitude of Colorado's Rockies tests two strangers ability to adapt and survive. Black bears are not only a predator threat but compete for limited resources. Storms roll in, bringing hailstorms and hypothermic conditions.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Devil's Woods

programme.desc: Dozer Dave bets his life savings that he can unearth piles of gold from an abandoned mine using salvaged equipment and a team of amateur miners.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Paydirt Mystery

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Last Chance Cut
programme.desc: Dave's entire season comes down to the final 24 hours and a bold risk that threatens to shut down his operation and force him out of the gold game for good.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: The Million Dollar Claim
programme.desc: When the pandemic puts Dave Turin's Alaskan mining dream on hold, he mobilizes his team to prospect in Arizona, Montana and Colorado. When all seems lost, they ultimately discover an abandoned claim that holds their best shot at a major gold yet.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 2

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Flood, Sweat, and Tears: Part One

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Gold

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: House of 30,000 Tires
programme.desc: The Raneys arrive in Ohio to find the Broadhead family struggling to survive in their home made of 30,000 tire bales. Battling intruding pests, flooding, and unstable walls, the Raneys have their hands full in one of their most challenging rescues yet.

programme.title: Pig Royalty

programme.title: Pig Royalty

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Ashley B's Story
programme.desc: At 600lbs, Ashley had to move home so her mom could help her care for not just herself but her newborn daughter too. Now Ashley must overcome a lifetime's worth of unfortunate circumstances and get Dr. Now's help in Houston to find a way to go on living.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Tammy's Journey
programme.desc: Through tough times, food has always been Tammy's friend. But now she has gotten so big that her daughters and mother have moved home to care for her, and unless Dr. Now can get her to confront her grief, food might be her killer.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Chrystal's Journey
programme.desc: Having her daughters help bathe her is not how Chrystal pictured parenting, but she is so large now that there's no other option. Chrystal wants Dr. Now's help, but she didn't know that bringing her childhood trauma to light would be part of the deal.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Moldy Cheese Feet
programme.desc: A woman with twisted toes, a man with Frankenstein feet and a mother with extreme calluses all have the doctors battling major cases.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Footnotes: Un-Cross My Toes
programme.desc: Dr. Ebonie, Dr. Brad and Dr. Sarah have their hands full with three extreme and challenging surgical cases, including crossed toes, unknown masses and even a ruptured Achilles, and they each try to make sure their patients will walk normally again.

programme.desc: Dr. Ebonie, Dr. Brad and Dr. Sarah have their hands full with three extreme and challenging surgical cases, including crossed toes, unknown masses and even a ruptured Achilles, and they each try to make sure their patients will walk normally again.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: A Big Fat Ultimatum

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Weight-Loss Surgery
programme.desc: While Whitney is undecided about where to live, the Greensboro crew hatches a plan to lure her back home and away from Ryan -- for good. With the fate of the business in jeopardy and her love life in ruins, Whitney faces some tough decisions.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Raising Quints 101

programme.title: Sister Wives: Polygamists in a Pandemic
programme.desc: Kody and the wives struggle to adapt to the pandemic as a polygamous family. Robyn is terrified for her children's health, and Janelle tearfully tells Kody to stay away. As he decides where he'll quarantine, Kody teaches the kids how to save toilet paper.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Different Wives, Different Rules
programme.desc: Utah has decriminalized polygamy, and Christine toys with the idea of moving back. Meanwhile, coronavirus cases are rising, and Arizona goes into lockdown. Janelle tells Kody to stop coming over, and the whole family grapples with how to handle it all.

programme.title: Return to Amish: The Panic in Amish Park
programme.desc: The pandemic has forced Jeremiah, Carmela, Ada and Sabrina to come together in Florida. Sabrina prepares for the arrival of her second child, while Jeremiah and Jethro must make peace. Rosanna and Maureen decide to leave their Amish communities.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: The Greek Goddess and the Giant Gown
programme.desc: A Greek Gypsy bride-to-be sets out to make history in the biggest, blinged-out wedding dress ever made. Later, it's a clash amongst the generations when a gypsy teen's sweet 16 party is derailed by her over-bearing traditional grandmother.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: So I Married My Ex-Babysitter ...
programme.desc: When a young gypsy man marries his ex-babysitter, the couple adds fire to a family feud that dates back to over 30 years. Later, a progressive gypsy woman defies her traditional Romanichal mom by marrying a gorger.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Rituals, Rules and the Ultimate Gypsy Test
programme.desc: A traditional gypsy mom demands that her daughter perform a series of ancient rituals to determine if she's ready to wed. Later, a gypsy teen plans to marry a gorger bad-boy against her family’s wishes.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: A Romney Rebel Returns
programme.desc: A runaway Gypsy mom tries to win back her twin daughter's affections by hosting a royal themed 18th birthday party. Later, a gypsy mom of two finally weds her gorger sweetheart, but a clash of cultures between the families threatens to derail their plans.

programme.desc: Scott experiences some troubling health issues and Kim heads to Washington to meet with some formerly incarcerated women. Khloe is determined to cure Kim of her fear of spiders.

programme.desc: Kelly and Steve investigate the 2016 homicide of a hard-working mother who was strangled to death and dumped in a ditch. Was it a random act of violence, or did her strained marriage factor in to her murder?

programme.title: Cold Justice: Inside the Episode: Preacher's Mother
programme.desc: A former prosecutor and a former CSI investigate unsolved murder cases in small towns.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: Secret Lives
programme.desc: This story was one of Andrea Canning's first assignments for 'Dateline,' and one she still can’t forget. When Jen Ramsaran disappeared, police searched online for clues and wondered if she escaped the real world for a fantasy world.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Plot Twist
programme.desc: For a group of stage actors, life seemed to be imitating art in the worst way when a young college student was killed. Police believed they knew who was responsible, but this mystery had a grand finale no one saw coming.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The House On Sidney's Cove
programme.desc: Nique Leili was juggling family and a thriving career. Then, she vanished. Police found something unusual: Nique's last months were recorded on security cameras around her home.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Closet Murderer
programme.desc: When a 98-year-old widow is found dead in her entryway closet, a chilling discovery leads investigators to a killer in the community who harbors a dark secret.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Driven to Murder
programme.desc: When police find the body of a popular taxi driver stuffed inside the trunk of his own car submerged in a river, they struggle to find suspects until the truth reveals a terrible plot to get revenge.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Unseen Assassin
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman and his closest friend are found shot execution style, leaving police with little to go on until a surprising development leads investigators to a killer no one ever suspected.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Twisted Betrayal
programme.desc: When a devoted mother with a bright future in show business is ruthlessly gunned down, a number of suspects emerge, but just as detectives think they have the killer in their sights, the investigation takes a jaw dropping turn.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Fatal Ambition
programme.desc: A hard-working young woman is discovered stabbed at the side of a road, leading police on a tireless investigation for 10 years to unveil a killer hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Tangled Web
programme.desc: Sam and Danielle Dreher appeared to have a storybook marriage but this ending was not happily ever after. When Sam was murdered, investigators discovered a twisted tale of secrets, lies and infidelity.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery at Ascot Estates
programme.desc: It was Friday the 13th and something sinister was about to happen: a chilling double murder in an upscale home. The evidence seemed to tell a clear story. Then investigators discovered a marriage filled with secrets and a story that didn't add up.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Girl With the Red Shoes
programme.desc: Annie Kasprzak has a second chance at a happy life after being adopted by her case worker. Then, the 15-year-old vanishes. Her parents find a note in her room that reveals a secret Annie has been hiding.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Someone Was Watching
programme.desc: It was a plot straight out of an Alfred Hitchcock film. A woman peers into a neighbor’s yard and catches a glimpse of something unsettling. What she saw and what she did set a chain of events in motion that would divide a family and a jury.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Rogers
programme.desc: In this bizarre mid-western saga, a grudge between a shady District Attorney and an eccentric local student turns deadly. Dogged investigators work for decades to bring a quartet of brothers to justice.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Defranciscos
programme.desc: When a body is found badly burned outside of Chicago, police work tirelessly to track down the killer of this young hardworking truck driver. The search leads them to an unlikely pair of teenage sisters who are able to evade police capture for years.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Youngs
programme.desc: When the patrons of a rural bar are murdered execution-style, two determined detectives work to track down a pair of killer brothers and solve the most heinous crime in the history of the small town.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Polands
programme.desc: Two brothers pull off an elaborate scheme in the desert to rob an armored van of $300,000. When investigators attempt to track down the illusive robbers, the case becomes a homicide once the bodies of the two guards driving the van turn up.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Romero and Self
programme.desc: In the fall of 1992, two brothers terrorize a California community when they embark on a 2-month crime spree that includes three brutal murders and many more near-death attacks. Investigators work to stop the killer siblings before they strike again.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Agofskys
programme.desc: Residents of quiet Noel, Missouri are shocked when the local bank is robbed in a brazen nighttime heist. The investigation takes a sinister turn when the bank’s president is found dead and a pair of brothers suddenly come into a lot of cash.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Lunas
programme.desc: The Luna brothers take wildly divergent paths, one becoming a decorated army officer, while another rises in a Mexican cartel. When the brothers' worlds collide, a murder ultimately brings them all down.

programme.title: Movie: Ted 2
programme.desc: After tying the knot, newlyweds Ted and Tami-Lyn are ready to start a family. They prepare for artificial insemination, but in order to gain custody of his child, Ted must go to court to prove that he's a person.

programme.title: Movie: Night School
programme.desc: A man who's tired of his dead-end life and humiliating job signs up for night school so that he can pass the GED exam and finally be a high school graduate, but with an eclectic group of students the teacher turns to unconventional ways of teaching.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: P.T.A It Ain't So
programme.desc: Linda attempts to become more involved with the P.T.A., inspired by its seemingly perfect president, Joanne. Meanwhile, Bob tries to cheer up a hardware store owner after unknowingly making a joke about his pet parrot that recently flew away.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Gene Mile
programme.desc: When the kids have to run a mandatory mile for school on free-ice-cream-day, they hatch an elaborate plot to sneak away. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda frantically try to secure discount tickets to a show at the Wharf Arts Center.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Yes Without My Zeke

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Ring (But Not Scary)

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dawn of Life

programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Journey to a Black Hole
programme.desc: Journey to the heart of the M87 supermassive black hole, the first and only black hole ever photographed, and explore the mystery of how it grew so large, what lies inside and how it controls the entire galaxy.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Journey to a Black Hole

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Mystery on Runestone Hill
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard begin a brand-new excavation at the mysterious Runestone Hill; what they find could change the course of their investigation.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: The Secret Evidence
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard investigate new leads, and when they meet a Native American professor who provides new information, they realize they must expand their investigation to the East Coast.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Expedition Viking
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard travel to the East Coast to see stone engravings that could provide further answers and evidence. They also meet with a historian who takes them on a boat trip to follow in the footsteps of the Vikings.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Relics of Intrigue
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard investigate a set of runestone relics that could reveal new truths about the mysterious Kensington Runestone.

programme.title: Billion-Dollar Elements: Copper
programme.desc: Uncover the source, process and people behind copper, the metal of the digital age, and explore a global mining powerhouse where a spectacular production process yields 250,000 tons of pure copper every year worth over $1.5 billion dollars.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Stranger Calling
programme.desc: Detective Rod Piukkala faces one of the most haunting cases of his career when a brutal and mysterious killer engages the police in an ever-escalating game of 'Catch Me If You Can,' taunting authorities and threatening to kill again.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: He Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Lila Warwick is a loving and hands-on grandmother of eight whose door is always open for holidays, birthdays or for anyone in need of a helping hand.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lie For Me
programme.desc: Air Force veteran Michael Giles disappears along with his savings of $206,000. Detectives discover a woman named Kwaneta Harris has been draining the man's accounts. But as they dig deeper, detectives uncover a massive conspiracy of greed and murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: It Looks Like You
programme.desc: A quiet town is shaken to its core when an innocent woman is gunned down in broad daylight. Detectives desperately act to find her killer and restore the peace. With a murderer on the loose, can video surveillance uncover what lies beneath?

programme.desc: A quiet town is shaken to its core when an innocent woman is gunned down in broad daylight. Detectives desperately act to find her killer and restore the peace. With a murderer on the loose, can video surveillance uncover what lies beneath?

programme.title: Murder Calls: Unholy Ghost
programme.desc: Church parishioners call 911 when they find their priest unconscious, after he fails to show up for Mass who has been stabbed to death. Police uncover an earlier call made by the victim himself, and track a missing cell phone to a find deranged killer.

programme.title: Murder Calls: The Devil's Voice
programme.desc: When two girls from neighboring counties disappear and are found murdered, one family receives multiple taunting calls from the kidnapper. Investigators work to track him down and succeed with they discover a clue delivered by the killer himself.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath: Blood Jungle
programme.desc: In Maui, a mother reports her pregnant daughter missing to police. As the island launches mass searches into the jungle, the discoveries get more horrifying and the lies more complex. The trial takes months as the evil behind this tragedy is exposed.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Oath
programme.desc: In search of a better life, the Shahanazari family immigrated from Iran to Glendale, California. But when the youngest son, Chris, is murdered in a violent home invasion, his older brother Sevan fears he himself is to blame.

programme.title: Disappeared: Flight Risk
programme.desc: On route to the airport, nineteen-year-old Katelin Akens makes an unexpected stop at a Virginia shopping mall...and vanishes. Police investigate her loved ones at length and start to suspect that someone close to Katelin may know more than they're saying.

programme.title: Disappeared: Off The Grid
programme.desc: Brian Histand, a 25-year-old BMX rider, was last seen wandering a field in southern Phoenix. As family and friends search, they learn of Brian's disconcerting behavior in his last few days.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Beauty for Ashes
programme.desc: In 2016, 33-year-old Tricia Todd was reported missing after failing to pick up her daughter from a babysitter. As her family hoped and prayed, investigators found her online journal that revealed the true horror of what had happened.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Online Secrets
programme.desc: In 2014, the scorched remains of a house fire reveal two female victims, a 17 year old girl named Mani and her mother Robin. When investigators dig deeper into the women's lives, they uncover a secret online relationship that led to tragedy.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Betrayed
programme.desc: When newlyweds Joe and Olga Connell are gunned down outside their Wilmington, Delaware home, police must investigate a sibling rivalry, a business partnership plagued by drugs, and an outlaw motorcycle gang.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Parents return home from a trip to find blood everywhere, signs of struggle and their teenage daughter missing. Police combing the desert for her stumble on her charred remains digital clues soon lead them to a shocking secret and a deadly betrayal.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: A son's shocking discovery about his father may prove his mom's death wasn't a suicide.

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Vulnerable
programme.desc: A secret addiction drives a young woman to sacrifice her wheelchair bound employer; a scheming caregiver betrays the man who trusts her; and a single mother's desire for a better life leads to a brutal dismemberment.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Adrift
programme.desc: Newlyweds set out for the adventure of a lifetime; their dream of sailing the world together. The honeymoon comes crashing into the dangers of reality for Don when he heads to the one remote island where a serial killer could be in hiding.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Pope's Bodyguards
programme.desc: From stone-age Hawaii to 16th-century Japan, from Ancient Greece to the Byzantine Empire, there have always been elite Special Forces.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Pilgrims and Witches
programme.desc: The roots of America can be traced to the first settlers that came there. Learn that the Pilgrim 'Thanksgiving' was about fasting and the only 'witchcraft' in Salem was done by a group of young girls.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: Learn that our Halloween's origins aren't all that ancient and that Edgar Allan Poe is not the madman that others have made him out to be.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Secret Vaults and Final Journeys
programme.desc: We open the nation's most secret vaults to separate fiction from fact, including taking a trip along the sea of truth to expose the myths surrounding the Titanic's final voyage.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: No Liars Allowed
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we'll reveal the true stories behind America's most infamous bad guys, and uncover the truths behind America's notorious secret societies.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Cowboys vs. Hollywood
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Pilgrims and Witches
programme.desc: The roots of America can be traced to the first settlers that came there. Learn that the Pilgrim 'Thanksgiving' was about fasting and the only 'witchcraft' in Salem was done by a group of young girls.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secret Weapons
programme.desc: Discover the unknown stories of some of the incredible plots, ploys and people behind America's secret weapons during the Cold War, the Vietnam War, and WWII.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: Rosa parks was not the first African American women to refuse to give up her seat. The Berlin Airlift included candy for kids. One of the great rifles used in war was invented by a man who made moonshine.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: What History Forgot: To the Ends of the World
programme.desc: Delve into the unknown stories behind some of the biggest disasters, threats and conquests in America's skies. From the attack on Pearl Harbor, the Hindenburg disaster, Apollo 13 and the race to the Moon.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Yukon Gold Rush War
programme.desc: This epic Gold Rush showdown pits legendary conman Jefferson 'Soapy' Smith and his loyal 'Soap Gang' against town organizer-turned vigilante Frank Reid and the Committee of 101, in a battle to bring justice to the lawless Alaskan Frontier.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Courage Under Fire
programme.desc: Four stories of courage under fire; a symbol of luck saves Marines in Korea; a handheld weapon protects Europe during the Cold War; an instrument sends a ship off to its depths and a letter helps write victory during the Revolutionary War.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: We're in Business
programme.desc: Mike and MJ decide to go into business together to buy houses and renovate them right. But MJ is in for a surprise when he discovers Mike has already purchased their first project, then finds another potential investment 3.5 hours away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Water: The Good, the Bad and the Money
programme.desc: MJ and Mike get a good deal on a St. Lawrence River eyesore in the Thousand Islands but inherit a house full of asbestos and are forced to call in a remediation team.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: What Comes Down Must Go Up
programme.desc: Facing major structural and water issues at the river house, Mike and MJ decide to take the whole house down so they can build it back up right. This is a major setback, and their profit will take a big hit unless they identify some areas to save.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Game Changer
programme.desc: Mike's vision for open concept at the suburban house hits a structural snag and MJ attempts to rein him in before the budget takes another hit. A fun surprise awaits the team at the river house, until Mike throws another curveball at MJ.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Making a Splash in Arizona
programme.desc: Jeromey and Jay of Premier Pools create a personal resort for Arizona newcomers: Sally and Samer.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cabanas and Cannonballs
programme.desc: A couple who recently moved into a new house in Austin, Texas, has decided it's finally time to build the family pool of their kids' dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: They say everything's bigger in Texas, and the pools are no exception. The Pool Kings are facing a big backyard and even bigger expectations from their interior design client.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Rocky Road to Backyard Bliss
programme.desc: A Nashville family is ready for Kyle and Justin to build the perfect pool in their backyard. The project gets off to a rocky start, but the Poll Kings deliver a phenomenal backyard complete with a massive waterfall and beautiful pavilion.

programme.title: Pool Kings: It's About Time
programme.desc: A family that had to delay pool plans after building a new home is finally ready to make their backyard vision a reality.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean and Classic in Corona
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Corona, California, to help a big extended family that's running low on living space. They design a clean, geometrical pool with an artistic fountain wall, fire features and a killer barbecue area for everyone to enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: All the Way Around
programme.desc: Mike and Jim have their work cut out for them when a Palm Springs couple wants to transform their narrow three-sided backyard into a personal resort by adding a grotto, zen area, putting green, oversized spa, and beach entry.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lake View Paradise
programme.desc: A couple wants to build their daughter a backyard oasis that also accentuates their beautiful lake views.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Natural Fit for a Fun Family
programme.desc: After moving to their forever home, a young family from College Grove, TN, is ready to build their dream pool. The Pool Kings accept the challenge, creating a tropical paradise with a massive waterfall, a swim-up bar and an oversized outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Everything But the Trellis
programme.desc: After moving into a lovely Santa Barbara home, that once belonged to a master gardener, this family with little interest in gardening decides to get help. Mike and Jim turn a garden path into a swimming lane, and the flowerbed into a stylish pool house.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Extra Meat Please
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Queens, New York, with a burger loaded to the max with beef, ham, bacon and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue in the Big Apple
programme.desc: Michael Symon is joined by his good buddy Michael Strahan at their favorite New York City burger spot. They bounce around The Big Apple dining on meatball sliders, succulent St. Louis style ribs and pastrami-topped pizza.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Tacos Del Carnival
programme.desc: Tacos are more than a staple of Mexican cuisine, they're a carnival favorite. Join Noah as he eats seven of the nation's most creative tacos. From a fresh succulent Soft Shell Crab Taco to authentic Tacos Al Pastor.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Carnival Italiano
programme.desc: Noah tries a clever calzone-Lasagna hybrid and a special pizza and pasta combo.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Children of the Corn on the Cob
programme.desc: From enchilada funnel cake to bacon bbq, Noah Cappe samples the menu at the Three Rivers Festival in Fort Wayne.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Point Break-Fast
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts the day right at the Shasta District Fair in Anderson, California.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mad Snacks: Berry Road
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels back in time at the Texas Renaissance Festival, where the medieval-inspired meals range from the Sir Francis fry dog to the crown jewel. Then it's over to Plant City, Fla., where Noah chows down on some berry delicious carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Requiem for an Ice Cream
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls into Alabama for some country carnival cookin' at the Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile. He digs into the dirty bird turkey leg and takes a ride on a crazy midway mashup.

programme.desc: Roger Mooking counts down 15 of the very best Italian dishes in the U.S. All the pastas, sauces, cheeses, pizzas, lasagnas and parms, no favorite is left behind. Also, chefs share authentic recipes and tips for making an Italian feast at home.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Oakland
programme.desc: Chef Jordan Andino checks out the Bay Area's biggest city, Oakland, California, and makes his first stop at Seawolf Public House for classic comfort foods with international flavors.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Memphis
programme.desc: Jordan Andinio fires up his evening with some Polynesian fare-gone Southern at Atomic Tiki in Memphis, a city known for BBQ and the blues, but there's much more to its late-night food scene.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Bacon
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases the towering BLTs, juicy bacon burgers, pizzas, pies, pancakes and more with the 12 tastiest bacon dishes in America.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Food Trucks
programme.desc: From fish tacos and porchetta sandwiches to shrimp po' boys and turtle sundaes, Roger Mooking is featuring the 12 best dishes from American food trucks.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Masters
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets two barbecue brainiacs who have mastered the art of marrying heat and meat to turn out top-notch barbecue. Pitmaster Christopher Prieto teaches students the science of smoking and seasoning meats at Prime Barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Getting Piggy With It
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes hog-wild at two legendary barbecue restaurants located in America's Barbecue Belt. At A&R Bar-B-Que in Memphis, Roger helps owner Andrew Pillard load racks of St. Louis-style ribs into custom wood-fired pits.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire And Family
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the South to visit two family-run barbecue joints that have been passing down recipes and rigs for generations.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat In Full Swing
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets up with a few culinary titans in Tennessee who are swinging for the fences with outrageous rigs. At Wedge Oak Farm in Lebanon, Tenn., he joins Chef Trey Cioccia, owner of Nashville's Black Rabbit, to set up the Burn Tower.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Raising the Heat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Lone Star State, where they're taking open-fire cooking to new culinary heights with unique rigs. In Fort Worth, Texas, chef and restaurateur Lou Lambert invites Roger to his ranch to slow-roast whole hogs over oak coals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Beef and Beyond
programme.desc: Beef is king in Texas, and Roger Mooking visits two pitmasters who are elevating traditional smoked meats with exciting global flavours. In Pearland, Texas, he helps Ronnie Killen season and smoke brisket and beef ribs to serve at Killen's Barbecue.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Strawberry to Silver Dollar
programme.desc: The Brandywine Strawberry Festival in Pennsylvania is home to 'The Colossalo,' a crab cake/roast beef combo that has host Noah Cappe going wild. Other favourites include The Sizzler, the chicken parm'wich and strawberry kettle corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Golden State to Gizzards
programme.desc: Beginning in California and ending in Michigan, Noah Cappe explores creative carnival eats like the jalapeno cheese skirt burger and deep fried gizzards.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Michigan to Maize
programme.desc: Noah gets busy with the" Soul on a Roll" sandwich, and the "To Die For" casserole. Salted caramel apple gelato is the thing to beat the heat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dumplings & Pumpkins
programme.desc: Noah's first stop is at the North Florida Fair in Tallahassee, where he feels the burn with dead heat tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bowls and Rolls
programme.desc: The Norfolk County Fair in Ontario, Canada, is a culinary carnival of good eats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat and Mandarins
programme.desc: Noah gets hot for the smokin' okra burger at the Eastern Carolina Agricultural Fair in Florence, SC. Then he launches into atomic habanero tots and 'The Big Yum' at the Mountain Mandarin Festival in Auburn, CA.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Endless Pasta-bilities
programme.desc: There's something about pasta that's exciting, and Eddie Jackson shares a combination of savory sauces and a variety of textures for this ever-evolving ancient dish. No matter what, pasta has endless pasta-bilities!

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Pizza Party
programme.desc: There's so much to love about pizza- crispy crust, savory sauce, ooey-gooey cheese and endless options for toppings. Pizza might just be the perfect meal, and Eddie Jackson has a day full of out-of-the-box slices to prove it.

programme.desc: Bluey thinks there are Fairies in the backyard; Bluey and Bingo are hired by Dad at the drainpipe factory; Dad and Bluey send Bingo a video.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Wacky Wednesday/ The Chipmunk and the Catfish
programme.desc: When one of Simon's inventions malfunctions, Jeanette and Alvin switch places. Theodore creates a fake alias online and pretends to be a girl.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Great Chipmunk Detective/ Guitar Hero
programme.desc: When Miss Miller gets robbed, Eleanor and Theodore promise to find the culprit and bring them to justice. Alvin begrudgingly agrees to teach Miss Smith guitar, but she won't reveal why she so desperately needs to learn.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Take and Fake/ Cosmo Rules
programme.desc: Timmy borrows Mark Chang's Fake-i-fier in order to attend Trixie's costume party.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Love Triangle
programme.desc: Poof and Foop compete to win the affections of Goldie Goldenglow, a magical new girl at Spellementary School while participating in the Spellementary School play, 'Mr. Cookie's Happy Day.'

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Cosmo Con/ Wanda's Day Off
programme.desc: Cosmo gets picked to host the secret fairy convention; Wanda visits a spa.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Lights, Camera, Adam/ A Case of Diary-Uh
programme.desc: Timmy lands the role of Cleft, the Boy Chin Wonder; Timmy uses Vickie's diary for revenge.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Double Trouble/ Liar Liar
programme.desc: Alvin sneaks into Simon's lab and accidentally clones himself; Alvin tells a small lie that quickly turns into a huge disaster.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pack Animal/ The Haunted Getaway
programme.desc: Dave tells Simon to throw out some stuff, and a few of his experiments end up in the wrong hands; Dave and the guys rent a cabin in the woods that might be haunted.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: I, Breakfast Bot/ Dynamic Do-Over
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Loud House: Left in the Dark/ Get the Message
programme.desc: Lincoln races his siblings to the couch in order to watch his favourite TV show. Lincoln must delete an angry voicemail from Lori's phone so she doesn't hear it.

programme.title: The Loud House: Crimes of Fashion/ Scales of Justice
programme.desc: When Leni gets fired from her job due to missing scarves, Lincoln and Clyde take on the case.

programme.title: The Loud House: Predict Ability / Driving Ambition
programme.desc: Lincoln fears he's predictable, so vows to change up his routine. Then, Lori gets the yips when she learns the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play.

programme.title: The Loud House: Hand-Me-Downer/ Sleuth or Consequences
programme.desc: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her. Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Towers/ Mrs. Puff, You're Fired
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krabs into Krusty Towers, an upscale hotel where the customer is king, even the most obnoxious and demanding ones. This pushes Squidward to the point of quitting and returning as a guest to make a series of outrageous requests.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The New Leaf/ Once Bitten
programme.desc: In the battle for fast food supremacy, Plankton has decided to throw in the towel and start a new business selling trinkets and souvenirs; Gary starts biting everyone in town, and Squidward is convinced that he has a rare snail disease.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Rise and Shine/ Waiting/ Fungus Among Us
programme.desc: A look inside Patrick Star's rock, and his daily routine. SpongeBob finds out his favourite cereal has a mail in prize and goes to great length to get the toy, but earning the toy proves easier than waiting for it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas/ Le Big Switch
programme.desc: Plankton creates a gas that turns everyone at the Krusty Krab into babies. After being enrolled in a cooks exchange program, SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef from a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: It's Pony: Nosy Pony/ Beatrice
programme.desc: When Annie tries to stop Pony from being nosy, she creates a bigger problem that puts him in danger. When Annie takes pity on a lonely friend and lets her spend the day with Pony, she worries her friend is better at taking care of Pony than she is.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Enemy-in-Law/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI
programme.desc: Krabs is horrified when he learns that the secret paramour dating his mother is Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale of a Birthday/ Karate Island
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wants to give his daughter the best birthday ever. SpongeBob is assigned the task of finding out what she would like; SpongeBob is invited to a karate competition on the mysterious Karate Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Student Starfish
programme.desc: It's another day of boating school for SpongeBob, and this time, Patrick wants to come along too. Patrick becomes the new student in SpongeBob's class, and from his introduction, begins getting SpongeBob in trouble.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for as long as anyone can remember, but Mr. Krabs explains that this wasn't always the case. Flashbacks reveal how their friendship went sour.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: To Love a Patty/ Breath of Fresh Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes the perfect Krabby Patty; Squidward begins to get on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Sponge/ Sing a Song of Patrick
programme.desc: Spongebob becomes popular at the Krusty Krab; Spongebob helps Patrick get radio play.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Driven to Tears/ Rule of Dumb
programme.desc: Sponge Bob fails his driver's test again, Pat asks them to prove the test can be passed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pink Purloiner/ Squid Wood
programme.desc: Rejected by Squidward, SpongeBob decides to make his own Squid ventriloquist dummy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Digs/ Krabs a la Mode
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab and turns it into an ice skating rink.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Operation Dad
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne tries to convince her Dad to move to the city with the help of Sid.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fool's Gold/ Flight Plan
programme.desc: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa’s gold./ Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl, Cj and Carlitos try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: I, Breakfast Bot/ Dynamic Do-Over
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Arr in the Family/ Finders Weepers
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wants to help CJ to get onstage at a Pirate Dinner Show. Then, Ronnie and Sid decide whether to take money from a lost coin purse they found at the mercado.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Trend Game/ This Bird Has Flown
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne realizes that she's not up to date on all of the latest trends, she seeks help from Carlota. Bobby struggles to find Sergio after wishing he would fly away and never come back.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Hypnobirthday to You/ Hall Monster
programme.desc: Jimmy hypnotizes into thinking it's his birthday; Jimmy is picked as hall monster.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Party at Neutron's/ Broadcast Blues
programme.desc: When Hugh and Judy go out for the evening, Jimmy invites the gang over for a party.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Return of the Nanobots
programme.desc: Jimmy's attempts to update the Nanobots lead to a lot of trouble.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Feud/ Great Egg Heist
programme.desc: Jimmy and Carl are caught in the middle of a lawn-related feud between their dads.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: One of Us/ Vanishing Act
programme.desc: Jimmy and Cindy take it upon themselves to return people in the town to acting normal.

programme.title: Movie: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: A bumbling panda's dreams of being a warrior may come true when a villain comes to town.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Guess Who's Shopping for Dinner/ New Roomie
programme.desc: Abuela teaches Ronnie Anne that getting ingredients for dinner is no small task. When Vito's apartment floods, the kids try to find an apartment that suits him best.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Walk Don't Run/ Croaked
programme.desc: In order to buy a new skateboard, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business that quickly gets out of hand. Then, Ronnie, Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog.

programme.title: The Loud House: Heavy Meddle/ Making the Case
programme.desc: After being picked on, Lincoln regrets telling his sisters to stay out of his business. When a video contest opens at school, Lincoln decides to record his sisters embarrassing themselves.

programme.title: The Loud House: Stage Plight/ Antiqued Off
programme.desc: Hoping to get closer to her crush, Benny, Luan tries out for the school play. When Clyde and schoolmate Zach bond over antiques, Lincoln finds himself feeling like a third wheel.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Un-send!/ The Orb
programme.desc: Simon accidentally sends an email venting about a professor and the boys must keep the teacher from reading it! Theodore has a hard time saying no and trouble ensues when Alvin needs Theodore to say yes.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Cat Sitter/ Addicted
programme.desc: Theodore gets stuck taking care of Miss Croner's cats during the week. Dave wants the boys to focus only on school. The Chipettes challenge the Chipmunks to go three hours without their favorite things.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: DuckTales: They Put a Moonlander on the Earth!
programme.desc: Webby sets out to prove to a homesick Penumbra that Earth can be a lot of fun by riding Glomgold's newest gift to Duckburg, the suspicious Flintferris Glomwheel.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Kreioke Night / The Mascot Upshot
programme.desc: Krei enlists Big Hero 6 to help launch his latest invention, a karaoke machine he calls 'Kreioke.' Hiro plans to defeat The Mascots once and for all.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bubble Boys/ Isabella and the Temple of Sap
programme.desc: Baljeet takes a break from his intense studying to go around town inside a giant bubble with Phineas and Ferb. Isabella, Adyson and the rest of the Fireside Girls go on an adventure to obtain a patch for sap collecting.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Get That Bigfoot Outa My Face!/ Tree to Get Ready
programme.desc: Gang is off to a visit at Phineas and Ferb's grandparents at their lake house.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Whoa-Oh, I'm On A Roll
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Take Me Down to The Donut County
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape from the ImpossiBin!
programme.desc: With F.O.W.L. at their heels, Scrooge tests out the Money Bin’s deadly new security system on Louie and Della, while Beakley and Webby train the others for an enemy attack.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Undercover Carl/ Hip Hip Parade
programme.desc: When Carl intercepts blue prints for Phineas and Ferb's Anti-Gravity Fun Launcher, he mistakenly thinks that they are assisting Dr. Doofenshmirtz with an evil plan so Major Monogram sends him incognito to uncover what the boys are doing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Hard Day's Knight/ I, Brobot
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on a medieval tournament; Candace takes the role of the Black Knight.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat
programme.desc: Cricket uses his first tip from working at Big Coffee to buy a singing toy fish. Gramma kicks the family out of the house for the day.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: The Owl House: Really Small Problems
programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: The Owl House: Understanding Willow
programme.desc: Luz, Willow, and Amity take a trip down Memory Lane.

programme.title: The Owl House: Enchanting Grom Fright
programme.desc: Luz experiences Grom, Hexside's version of prom, and it's not what she expects.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Listen To Your Bey's Voice!
Phineas and Ferb: Skiddley Whiffers/ Tour de Ferb
programme.desc: The boys build a giant version of a childhood game, using Danville as the central location. Candace ends up playing along with them so that she can carry on her title of 'Skiddley Whiffers Queen.' Doofenshmirtz tries to deal with Vanessa growing up.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out of Toon/ Hail Doofania!
programme.desc: Boys create a cartoon and cast themselves as superheroes and the villain is Candace.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: E:60: Man in the Middle
programme.desc: Featuring clips from press conferences with Rudy Gobert, footage of his life growing up as an unknown basketball player in France, to a tour of his childhood home with the full-grown Jazz All-Star.

programme.title: Reba: The Cat's Meow

programme.title: Reba: Regarding Henry
