programme.title: Reba: The Great Race
programme.desc: Reba agrees to compete against Brock in a race to raise money for Jake's school.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Before and After
programme.desc: Rose is convinced she died during a throat spasm. This leads her to live her life to the hilt, totally disrupting the other girls' lives. Then, when the girls complain about her new lifestyle, Rose moves out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Then There Was One
programme.desc: Sophia readies herself for participating in a walkathon. Meanwhile, Dorothy, Blanche, and Rose babysit for the walkathon participants' children. But when the event is over, a baby is left unclaimed.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bedtime Story
programme.desc: When the girls learn that a number of relatives are going to be visiting, they reminisce about times they've had to share a bed and strange places they've had to sleep, including a train station.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Forgive Me, Father
programme.desc: Blanche and Rose plan a nice dinner at the house for Dorothy and her new boyfriend, who she later learns is a priest. She later gets another shock when she learns he plans to leave the church.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Long Day's Journey Into Marinara
programme.desc: Sophia's sister, Angela arrives in Miami for a visit and decides to move there but while she's looking for an apartment Dorothy invites her to stay with the girls. This ticks off Sophia since she thinks that Angela is after everything that she has.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Whose Face Is This, Anyway?
programme.desc: Blanche is convinced that her beauty is fading after attending her high school reunion and discovers many of her classmates have had face lifts. Meanwhile, Rose is making a home movie for class she's taking.

programme.title: Movie: A Dash of Love
programme.desc: When an aspiring chef lands an assistant job at her idol's restaurant, she's convinced her big break is just around the corner. After a rocky start, she befriends the handsome executive chef and they bond in the kitchen.

programme.title: Movie: A Brush With Love
programme.desc: As she considers giving up on her artistic dreams, Jamie paints a vision board that brings her success and love - only to discover that the mystery man in her painting isn't who she thinks.

programme.title: Movie: Hearts of Spring
programme.desc: A mommy blogger finds herself being attacked by a reader that has conflicting advice. While she deals with him online she finally meets a great single dad and sparks start to fly.

programme.title: The Office: Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Andy tries to work up the nerve to quit his job and pursue his dreams of stardom. Dwight finally receives his karate black belt from his new sensei and has his best day ever at work.

programme.title: The Office: A.A.R.M.

programme.title: The Office: Hot Girl

programme.title: The Office: The Dundies
programme.desc: The Dunder Mifflin employees suffer through the annual office awards ceremony, The Dundies, hosted by their pompous boss Michael Scott at their local watering hole.

programme.title: The Office: Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Just as his best friend Todd Packer visits the office, Michael fears that a new corporate crackdown on sexual harassment will dampen his reputation.

programme.title: South Park: A Scause for Applause

programme.title: South Park: Towelie

programme.desc: A fire in the kitchen forces the employees of the Dunder Mifflin paper company to the parking lot. To ease everyone's boredom, Jim suggests a game where staff members reveal a little too much information about themselves.

programme.desc: When Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin crew on a motivational harbour cruise aboard a party boat on Lake Wallenpaupack, things get out of hand and Michael ends up in the brig. Meanwhile, Jim is bummed when Roy and Pam finally set a wedding date.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Valentine's Day Massacre
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, the doctors treat dozens of injured people after the roof collapses at a popular romantic restaurant. Meanwhile, Derek tries to manage his busy schedule as Chief of Surgery as Meredith wrestles with her new duties as the Chief's wife.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: The Time Warp
programme.desc: In his new role as Chief, Derek restores the hospital lecture series, and Richard, Bailey and Callie present pivotal surgical cases from their pasts to the group.

programme.desc: When an LA cop turns up dead, Brenda and her team race against the clock to get the truth. The relationship between Fritz and Brenda elevates to a whole new level.

programme.title: The Closer: Mom Duty
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Brenda Johnson has to deal with an unexpected visit from her mother. Brenda's boyfriend, Agent Fritz Howard, was planning to move in, but will have to put their move on hold. An investigation becomes more complicated with each clue.

programme.title: The Closer: Slippin'
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Brenda Johnson investigates the shooting of three youngsters. The shooting has all the marks of a gang related crime. Meanwhile Brenda must deal with her mother.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Off the Wagon
programme.desc: Andy and Mike delve into the mysterious overdose of a young Hollywood star and the trail of emotional destruction he left in his wake. Meanwhile, Rusty finally comes to a conclusion about how to handle the pregnancy of his biological mother.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Family Law
programme.desc: When a jogger takes a nasty fall down the steps of L.A.'s storied Greek Theatre, Major Crimes finds itself investigating a divorce attorney with a lot of angry clients, and Lt. Tao goes undercover in the world of college age hookers.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Dead Zone
programme.desc: While investigating a murder that has personal implications for Sanchez, the squad uncovers a much larger criminal operation. Meanwhile, Buzz comes face to face with someone that may have been present at his father's murder.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Love Taps
programme.desc: The murder of a college student takes an odd turn when Jane and Maura discover he had 32 girlfriends. Uncovering who killed him and why leads them into a world of app developers, virtual boyfriends, and relationships built on lies.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Deceived to Death
programme.desc: A man's estranged wife hires a man to beat her husband to death. Then, a serial molester in Oregon abducts two women at knifepoint.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Murder in the Mountains
programme.desc: After leaving her husband Shane Miller, Sandy eventually returns home with their two daughters. Days later, a 911 call brings police to the home where they discover the murdered bodies of Sandy and the kids with Shane nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her home while her husband is on a sailing trip. When investigating, police uncover a lifestyle of sex parties and wife swapping.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A family realizes that their health problems could be related to an uninvited 'guest.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: BattleBots: Bounty Hunters: Bronco's Back
programme.desc: Bounty hunting season is here and eight teams are facing off in a new style of BattleBots tournament. Heavy hitters Captain Shrederator, Madchatter, Chomp, Rotator and more face off for a shot at Bronco, the greatest flipper-bot of all time!

programme.title: BattleBots: Bounty Hunters: Predator Becomes Prey
programme.desc: Four contenders get ready to take down the most celebrated bot in history.

programme.title: BattleBots: Bounty Hunters: Cold as Ice
programme.desc: Eight brave challengers face off for a chance to become the Bounty Hunter and get a shot at the legendary horizontal spinner bot Icewave. A $25,000 purse is at stake and both veterans and newcomers are prepared to do whatever it takes to go the distance.

programme.title: BattleBots: Let the Big Bot Battle Begin
programme.desc: The 2019 runner-up Witch Doctor starts their campaign against last year's breakout-bot Hydra. Titans Mammoth and Huge face off in an epic battle of the big bots and the elusive Black Dragon risks robotic life and limb against Kraken.

programme.desc: Eight brave challengers face off for a chance to become the Bounty Hunter and get a shot at the legendary horizontal spinner bot Icewave. A $25,000 purse is at stake and both veterans and newcomers are prepared to do whatever it takes to go the distance.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Lethal Landslide
programme.desc: A turbulent landslide rips down the side of the mountain where a local hard rock mining operation is in full swing. Then, Dozer Dave bets his life savings that he can unearth piles of gold using salvaged equipment and a team of amateurs.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Mercury Rising
programme.desc: Toxic mercury used by miners in a remote village prompts Parker to build a retort to prevent the dangerous fumes from spreading, but a surprise flash flood may prevent him from returning to the village.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: The Monster Mine

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Hunt for Hidden Gold
programme.desc: Driven to find a lost gold mine, Parker joins forces with the grandson of a legendary gold miner in search of a hidden El Dorado lost since World War II.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Parker vs. Backhoe
programme.desc: Rugged terrain pushes Parker's heavy machinery skills to their limit, forcing him to attempt one dangerous maneuver after another in his quest to open a legendary lost gold mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Path to Gold
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus scenes: In his final days of his journey in Papua New Guinea, Parker heads into the jungle to find gold for the locals. Parker is pushed to his limits when he encounters landslides and hostile locals.

programme.title: Pig Royalty
programme.desc: Discover a competition unlike any other as families showcase pigs across Texas. These prized swine and the people who raise them are some of the fiercest contenders around, uncovering what it takes to bring home the bacon.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Golden Playbook
programme.desc: As Dave prepares for a new season of hunting gold, he gathers his team to go over the strategy in his mining playbook and looks back at lessons learned. Not only does he reveal their new prospecting location, but also makes his crew a life-changing offer.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Rocky Mountain Gold
programme.desc: Dave Turin and his crew kick off an epic new mining season in the historic hills of Montana. After a freak accident nearly derails their expedition from the start, they rally and find the first big gold of the season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Big Bowl Bet
programme.desc: After a great start, thick clay in the pay dirt clogs the sluice, forcing Dave Turin and his crew to quickly troubleshoot the land and get the operation back on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Vanishing Gold
programme.desc: Tensions and suspicions mount when the crew is failing to see the gold they know they should be capturing. A deeper look in the gold room leads to an incredible revelation that eases the team's fears and gets them back on track.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Gold Will Surrender
programme.desc: Dave's crew is hunting for better ground and behind on their gold target. To turn their season around, Dave calls on a mining legend for help searching for gold at the historic Birdseye mine in Montana.

programme.title: Pig Royalty
programme.desc: Discover a competition unlike any other as families showcase pigs across Texas. These prized swine and the people who raise them are some of the fiercest contenders around, uncovering what it takes to bring home the bacon.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Back on Gold
programme.desc: Dave Turin and his crew turn their trommel up to double speed hoping to get the most gold from Montana's historic Birdseye mine. Dirty water and ground that's not producing challenge the crew, forcing Dave to call an audible at the last minute.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Boundary Blowout
programme.desc: On the scent of big gold, Turin and his crew test the limits of the landowner's patience when they cut a fence to access ground on his cattle grazing land. Dave investigates another promising hard rock mine.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Coronavirus Changes Everything

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Escape from Quarantine
programme.desc: Local quarantine restrictions are lifted, and the Busbys are ready to salvage the rest of their summer! Things take a turn for the worse when they discover a huge issue lurking in the kitchen walls. Parker faces an old fear, and Dale surprises the family.

programme.desc: Blayke gets her big girl sleepover while the Quints invade Uncle Dale and Aunt Crystal's for the night. The kitchen renovation goes from bad to worse. The Busbys try to teach the girls to ride bikes. Hazel gets a surprise visit from her boyfriend, Graham.

programme.title: Girl Talk: Knowledge Is Our Superpower

programme.desc: With Halloween approaching, the Busbys scramble to make the holiday spook-tacular and safe in the pandemic. Riley's refusal to sleep in her room wreaks havoc on the household. A hurricane threatens Lake Charles, forcing friends and family to evacuate.

programme.desc: When Kourtney isn't ready for a big product launch in NYC, her sisters help her get her head in the game. Meanwhile, a very pregnant Kim accidently upsets her best friend Jonathan. Kim makes sure Kylie is making the most of her newfound opportunities.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fear the Unknown
programme.desc: Knowing her family's history with cancer, Kris wants the girls to take a genetic test to know their risks, but not everyone is on board. Meanwhile Kendall struggles to find a balance in her relationship with Caitlyn.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Beginnings and Endings
programme.desc: Khloe and Tristan run into some roadblocks in the process of expanding their family, Scott faces some big decisions about his relationship, and Kim prepares for a test that will determine her future as a lawyer.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Comment
programme.desc: When Scott accidentally causes some speculation that Khloe and Tristan are back together, Khloe is overwhelmed by the backlash online. The family worries that Kim is going through a difficult time and tries to cheer her up. Kendall has baby fever.

programme.title: For Real: The Story of Reality TV: Celebs: Just Like Us!?
programme.desc: The Osbournes, The Kardashians, Kendra Wilkinson, and Danny Bonaduce reveal the pros and cons of pioneering 'celebreality'. Host Andy Cohen ambushes Kim, Khloe, Kourtney, and Kris on set for behind the scenes stories of their iconic series.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Stuffed With Victory
programme.desc: Geoffrey Zakarian and TV host Sara Haines have a lot to be thankful for at the table this year, and they've brought in Creole Chef Bernard Carmouche and meatball master Daniel Sharp to stuff Bobby Flay like a turkey.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Mazel Tov
programme.desc: Alex Reznik brings his kosher cuisine against Reno, Nev.'s Colin Smith in this battle for bragging rights. Iron Chef Michael Symon and soap star Susan Lucci bring the drama and the heat to take Bobby Flay down!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bring Home the Bacon
programme.desc: Food Network's Sunny Anderson and Cutthroat Kitchen judge Chef Jet Tila cause a ruckus as they try to beat Bobby Flay. They bring in two chefs from New England.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Defend the House
programme.desc: Chopped judge Alex Guarnaschelli and Cutthroat Kitchen's Alton Brown have arrived in the arena with their eye on the prize; beating Bobby Flay in his house.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: At It Again
programme.desc: Chopped Champions Seis Kamimura and Demetrio Zavala try to beat Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Three of Bobby's closest friends are playing by his rules just to take him down, as Chefs Alex Guarnaschelli and Michael Symon go head-to-head in the arena and Katie Lee leads the charge.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Power Trip
programme.desc: Actor Joseph Sikora joins Michael Symon to bring the muscle into Bobby Flay's kitchen. They recruit superchefs Ian Rynecki and Ruth Wigman to put the squeeze on Bobby as they try to best him with a win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: No Cake Walk
programme.desc: Three of Bobby Flay's friends unite to try and take him down. Sunny Anderson, Alex Guarnaschelli and Buddy Valastro do their best to take the cake.

programme.desc: Robert Irvine visits Cafe No Fur in Las Vegas, where the owners, a model and a former poker player, are so stuck in their dysfunctional ways that the restaurant is on the verge of folding after only two years.

programme.title: Dinner: Impossible: 3 Weddings and a Robert

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: So Much Shade

programme.desc: Dre and Bow confront gender biases of their own after finding out that both Junior and Zoey have become sexually active. Meanwhile, Ruby is hurt when she finds out that Jack and Diane have been hanging out with a friend's grandmother after school.

programme.desc: When both Dre and Bow's families show up for Easter, they have to learn to love each other's different cuisines. Meanwhile, Junior tries to organize an Easter egg hunt but Jack and Diane pretend not to be interested to impress their cooler cousins.

programme.desc: Jon Knight must preserve the history of a 280-year-old farmhouse while also making it feasible for modern living. When he learns that part of the foundation is beyond saving, he makes the shocking proposition to the owners to tear down half of the home.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: Third Generation Renovation
programme.desc: A historical house from 1873 is transformed into a vibrant, modern home for a young family. Jon Knight and Kristina Crestin give this family of five a home with fun colors, shiny brass, whimsical bird wallpaper and even a beehive.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: A Coastal Farmhouse
programme.desc: Jon Knight and Kristina Crestin have their biggest budget yet to overhaul an old family home while honoring three generations of memories. They give this family a breezy, coastal home full of sentimental touches and nods to their farming history.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: A Farmhouse for a Chef
programme.desc: An outdated farmhouse is transformed into a functional family home with an earthy design. Jon Knight and Kristina Crestin create a kitchen fit for a chef, a cozy, traditional New England family room and even a goat jungle gym for their new farm animals.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Drab Victorian Gets a Fab Facelift
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs help a woman turn her historic 1905 home into a beautiful Victorian retreat. But they have their work cut out for them with its shoddy, unfinished contracting work throughout the living room, kitchen, master bedroom and back porch.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A New Lease on Life

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Outdated to Modern

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Rustic Cabin to Contemporary Retreat

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find a special balloon for Keia's birthday party. When the pugs' cousin, Cody, goes missing during a game of hide-and-seek, Bingo and Rolly must find him before his family comes to pick him up.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: Secret Lives
programme.desc: This story was one of Andrea Canning's first assignments for 'Dateline,' and one she still can’t forget. When Jen Ramsaran disappeared, police searched online for clues and wondered if she escaped the real world for a fantasy world.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery at Ascot Estates
programme.desc: It was Friday the 13th and something sinister was about to happen: a chilling double murder in an upscale home. The evidence seemed to tell a clear story. Then investigators discovered a marriage filled with secrets and a story that didn't add up.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Girl With the Red Shoes
programme.desc: Annie Kasprzak has a second chance at a happy life after being adopted by her case worker. Then, the 15-year-old vanishes. Her parents find a note in her room that reveals a secret Annie has been hiding.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Marc Despain was a married father of two and a successful real estate appraiser. He was busy building a life, until his ended all too soon. Investigators wondered if money was a motive, or maybe a family rift. His loved ones wanted answers.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Trust
programme.desc: Wealthy residents felt safe in their gated community but it was not safe for one millionaire, murdered in his waterfront home. Police investigated but the case grew cold. Turned out the key to solving it, or two keys, were right at the front door.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Domestic Terror
programme.desc: A Naval officer who rose through the ranks and once questioned terrorists at Guantanamo Bay is found by his wife, dead inside a Florida hotel room. Is the brutal crime connected to his wartime service, or are secrets closer to home to blame?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Someone Was Watching
programme.desc: It was a plot straight out of an Alfred Hitchcock film. A woman peers into a neighbor’s yard and catches a glimpse of something unsettling. What she saw and what she did set a chain of events in motion that would divide a family and a jury.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Dark Valley
programme.desc: Gavin Smith was dashing. When he vanished, LA detectives were unsure if they were investigating a crime or a suicide. His wife said he'd gotten lost in drugs and flings. Police wondered if the key to finding Gavin was hidden in one of those affairs.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Savior or Sinner?
programme.desc: When a North Carolina preacher's wife is found murdered, police must determine not only who may want her dead, but whether some members of the congregation are mourning – or trying to cover up their part in the violent crime.

programme.title: Killer Motive: The Best of Friends
programme.desc: When the body of insurance salesman Brian Davis is found alongside a bayou in Calcasieu Parish, Louisiana, police discover that he is a man with a life full of secrets. But could those closest to him be hiding the biggest secret of all?

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: The Cop's Wife
programme.desc: A police officer discovers his young wife with a fatal gunshot wound from his service weapon. Her death is ruled a suicide. Investigators uncover a shocking story that leads to a sensational trial with an even more sensational verdict.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Dead in the Water
programme.desc: A husband discovers his wife face down in their bathtub. Her death appears to be an accident but questions are raised about how she drowned. Was it a drug overdose? Did she slip and fall? The investigation exposes the disturbing truth.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Red Sash Death
programme.desc: A beloved grandmother is found with a red bathrobe sash knotted around her neck. Her death looks like suicide until the Medical Examiner rules homicide. The victim's 76-year-old husband is charged with murder but the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Strangers on a Train
programme.desc: She was beautiful, trusting and troubled. The young woman from a prominent family was just turning it around and realizing her promise. Then she vanished. When the police seemed unable to find her, her family hatched a plan to solve the mystery.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: New Jersey Nightmare

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Deadly Disrespect

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aztec Alien Mystery
programme.desc: When satellite images reveal spot a strange white substance in the land of the Aztecs, experts investigate the site for extraterrestrial connections; what they find could explain the rise of one of the world's greatest civilizations.

programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of an abandoned town hidden in the American wilderness, and as experts analyze this new evidence, they reveal what this strange place has to do with a top-secret military plan to battle an army of the undead.

programme.desc: A gruesome archaeological discovery leads to a shocking excavation that uncovers ancient human carnage on a scale that's unparalleled; experts use 3-D bone modeling to reveal evidence of what may be the first catastrophic, major war in human history.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Mystery on Easter Island

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Secrets of Mayan Murders
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavating a historic Chilean site make a chilling discovery and find decapitated human skulls separate from a nearby burial site; experts use advanced cranial forensics to reveal what really happened to these ancient, butchered victims.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Gladiator Graveyard
programme.desc: When a mass grave of mutilated skeletons is unearthed at the frontier of the Roman Empire, experts use advanced digital analysis to reveal the mystery behind these grisly remains.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Secrets of Mayan Murders
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavating a historic Chilean site make a chilling discovery and find decapitated human skulls separate from a nearby burial site; experts use advanced cranial forensics to reveal what really happened to these ancient, butchered victims.

programme.desc: The ocean's darkest depths are home to mysterious creatures, but none more terrifying than the giant squid. Now experts use new technology to make shocking discoveries that might reveal the secrets of this fearsome monster.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Yeti: The Real Evidence
programme.desc: A new investigation into the legend of the Yeti uses cutting-edge science and technology to test the existence of this mysterious beast; what experts discover sheds new light on the mythical monster of the Himalayas.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Beast of Fear Island
programme.desc: A giant bear terrorizes the Alaskan wilderness and a team of experts use state-of-the-art technology to track down this mysterious beast.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Devil of the Deep
programme.desc: The Loch Ness Monster is rumored to have destroyed a German World War 1 boat, and using new technology a team uncovers if the legendary sea monster could have caused the wreck.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Trail of Frozen Tears
programme.desc: Pretty pre-teen Rosie Davenport is found brutally murdered in an abandoned house, the circumstances of her death eerily similar to the unsolved murder of 13-year-old Malissa Thomas one year earlier.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: No Secret Is Safe
programme.desc: An early morning home invasion and double-murder appears to be drug-related, but when investigators speak to the lone survivor of the attack they discover a more sinister motive.

programme.title: Shattered: No Good Deed
programme.desc: In 2009, one woman's long and painful struggle to overcome addiction and help others ends in a way no one ever saw coming.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Reputation
programme.desc: Dr. Margo Prade is shot to death in the parking lot of her own medical practice in Akron, Ohio, and the senseless act shocks the city. Police are baffled. Until they discover that Margo's phone calls were being secretly recorded.

programme.title: Diabolical: Masking Evil
programme.desc: A burning car is found by the side of a highway on the same night a single mother of two is reported missing. These two events are connected, and connecting the dots will lead investigators to a notorious criminal who has been hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: A Rocky Relationship
programme.desc: A Facebook friend request turns a 38-year-old woman's quest for love into a horrific cautionary tale about the dangers of the internet.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Beautiful Mess
programme.desc: When twentysomething Patricia Richmond is found tied up, and murdered in her future in-laws' home, the resort town of Steamboat Springs, Colorado is at a loss.

programme.desc: Dr. Margo Prade is shot to death in the parking lot of her own medical practice in Akron, Ohio, and the senseless act shocks the city. Police are baffled. Until they discover that Margo's phone calls were being secretly recorded.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Blood Mountain
programme.desc: When a woman is found murdered on the Appalachian Trail and her husband is missing, authorities are left wondering if he's the killer or another victim. But when more bodies begin to disappear, it's clear a deadly predator is stalking in the woods.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: When a woman is found brutally murdered in her home, all signs point to a local troublemaker. But when more bodies start piling up, police realize they may have a serial killer at large - preying on the town's most vulnerable citizens.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Who Killed the Councilman?
programme.desc: Matt Garcia, a popular young city councilman, is shot dead in Fairfield, California. Politicians and an anxious public demand answers. Drug dealers, political rivals, and even Matt's own father fall under suspicion.

programme.title: Killer in Question: The Girl in the Lake
programme.desc: In 1987, 11-year-old Teresa McAbee goes missing near her home in Mascotte, Florida. When her body is found the next morning, James Duckett, the only police officer on duty in town, comes under suspicion for her murder. But not everyone thinks he's guilty.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Mysteries: The Missing Teacher and The College Stalker
programme.desc: A Georgia teacher vanishes, rattling a small town and prompting a search that lasts over a decade. Plus, the disappearance of a college student in Charlottesville devastates her family, until a connection is made to another local disappearance.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Mysteries: In Too Deep and Death at the Beauty School
programme.desc: A young soldier in Fort Stewart, GA quits a dangerous militia, but his decision has deadly consequences. Plus, when a cosmetology student in Wenatchee, WA disappears from school and is found dead by a river, no one can believe who killed her.

programme.title: Atlanta Olympic Bombing: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: At the 1996 Olympics, a security guard discovers pipe bombs and clears the area to minimize fatalities. Praised as a hero, the FBI then decides he fits the profile of a domestic terrorist, while the real villain continues his terror campaign.

programme.title: True Conviction: The Stalker
programme.desc: After computer whiz Cari Farver goes missing, she starts sending threatening text messages to a new boyfriend, his ex-lover and her mother.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: Death of Innocence
programme.desc: When 9-year-old Annaijh Rolax and 15-year-old Shawn Powe are murdered in the city of Atlanta, the Atlanta Homicide team are driven more than ever to find justice for these young victims.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: My Son Is Not a Monster
programme.desc: An 11-year-old's soon-to be step-mom is found murdered in their home. A child-sized shotgun, gun residue on his clothes, and a witness account all seem to point to the boy as the shooter.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Hidden Evil
programme.desc: 27 year-old beauty, Sherri Jackson has vanished leaving behind a blood smeared apartment. As investigators launch a frantic search for Sherri, they discover she was harboring a dark and violent secret that may have gotten her killed.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Heat of the Night
programme.desc: In El Dorado County, CA, firefighters combatting a raging fire discover a burnt out SUV with the charred remains of a beloved local man reported missing just hours earlier, igniting an investigation into a sinister scheme, and exposing a deadly affair.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Too Close to Home
programme.desc: The New England chills of the New Year bite even more brutally when a mother and daughter are savagely murdered in their Woburn, MA home. With several suspects on the line, detectives take a shot in the dark in order to solve this nightmare of a mystery.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Great Escapes
programme.desc: Four stories highlighting great escapes; a monocular that helped save a stranded pilot; the rifle that helped a WWII hero cheat death; the hand-drawn map used to destroy SAM sites; and a Saint's medal that served as one scout pilot's lucky charm.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Smoking Guns
programme.desc: A classic western gunfight, a battle between a US naval patrol and a German U-Boat, a stagecoach bandit hell bent on revenge and a revolutionary tactic that turned the course of a war.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Heroes
programme.desc: Four stories of heroism; A golden statue for Marines shooting a battle; The medal of honor for a daring train robbery; A General's plans that led the U.S. into WWII; and a piece of paper that spells death for Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: What History Forgot: To the Ends of the World
programme.desc: Delve into the unknown stories behind some of the biggest disasters, threats and conquests in America's skies. From the attack on Pearl Harbor, the Hindenburg disaster, Apollo 13 and the race to the Moon.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: Rosa parks was not the first African American women to refuse to give up her seat. The Berlin Airlift included candy for kids. One of the great rifles used in war was invented by a man who made moonshine.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Backyard Beauty
programme.desc: Being close to the water in South Bethany, Delaware means unwanted wear and tear on Jay and Christine's back deck. They enlist Marnie to update and renovate the space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: A House Built on Sand
programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Sun Room to Fun Room
programme.desc: After years of pleading from their daughters, this couple has agreed to renovate their '90s themed house. Now it's up to Marnie to bring their house into the 21st century and make it comfortable enough for three generations.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Supersizing in St. Petersburg, Florida
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple loves their Florida lifestyle and desires to be on the water in St. Petersburg, which means they must take on a renovation project.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Poolside Paradise in Cocoa Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Candice and Brian are moving from Denver, Colo. to Cocoa Beach, Fla., and have enlisted broker Andy Barclay to help them find a home on the water with a pool and a large outdoor space for their two daughters.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Mathews, Virginia
programme.desc: A couple hunts for a new forever home near the beach in Mathews, VA. They find a house that could be perfect for their family of four but it's a fixer-upper and their budget is tight.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: On the Hunt for a St. Pete Beach Retreat in Florida
programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: St. Joe Beach Overhaul
programme.desc: A couple find a vacation home in St. Joe Beach, but it needs extensive renovations to work for their family. Luckily, they own a construction company, but unforeseen structural issues and budget concerns threaten their plans.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: One of a Kind
programme.desc: We're talking about dishes that are unique, original and unlike anything that's come before. Alton Brown has his eye- and his stomach- set on a genuine creation called the Crab Rangoon Pizza.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Trigger Foods
programme.desc: We're losing all control and giving in to ultimate food cravings. Geoffrey Zakarian starts things off like never before with the most juicy and succulent roast chicken from New York City. Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: My Fave vs Your Fave: Bar Food Brawl
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson hosts a debate over the best bar foods with Chef Christian Petroni, foodie Ali Khan and former food editor Nilou Motamed.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shares the best of weird and wild Portland, OR, a city whose personality is apparent in its food culture. Local favorites include boozy doughnuts, Thai fish sauce chicken wings and even crawfish boils.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jerusalem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern investigates the rich culinary heritage of Jerusalem. From savory classics like shawarma, falafel, kubbeh and hummus to tempting pastries like halva and bureka, this holy city's edible icons are steeped in history.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Wisconsin
programme.desc: Andrew visits America's Dairy Land, but he finds out there's a lot more going on with the food in Wisconsin than meets the eye. Andrew finds that Wisconsinites are finding new ways to do things the old fashioned way. He discovers the science behind milk.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: West Virginia
programme.desc: Andrew travels to West Virginia, where people are using methods both old and new to prepare wildlife that flourishes in the state's mountains and rivers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah

programme.desc: When Marco breaks his arm before a big karate tournament, Star tries to fix it with magic but accidentally turns it into a giant tentacle. The Diazes are visited by their charming former exchange student Gustav, and Star quickly becomes jealous.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Lobster Claws/ Sleep Spells
programme.desc: Ludo fires one of his minions, Lobster Claws, so Marco and Star help him adjust to life on Earth. Marco uses psychology to help Star when she starts using magic in her sleep.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Interdimensional Field Trip/ Marco Grows a Beard
programme.desc: Star leads a class field trip to a museum in another dimension and puts the entire class in danger. Then, when Star flubs the spell used to help Marco grow a beard, the beard grows out of control and engulfs the house.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Mewnipendance Day/ The Banagic Incident
programme.desc: Star leads a battle re-enactment as part of a Mewni Independence Day celebration with her friends on Earth. Then, Star sees a commercial for a magical Earth product and sets off on her own to buy it.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Sleepover/ Gift of the Card
programme.desc: It's Star's slumber party and Ponyhead suggests they play a game she brought from Mewni. Marco has to use a gift card that Star gave him before it expires.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Mathmagic/ The Bounce Lounge
programme.desc: Star must solve a math problem or her world will fall apart; Star and her friends try to stop the Bounce Lounge from closing.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Illusory Dragon! Mirage Fafnir!
Phineas and Ferb: Let's Take a Quiz/ At the Car Wash
programme.desc: Candace wants to win popularity by going on Phineas and Ferb's TV game show. Later, an automatic carwash is created to help Isabella and the Fireside girls meet their fundraising goals.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Candace Disconnected/ Magic Carpet Ride
programme.desc: Candace has no choice but to go to her brothers for help after she loses her phone for the fifth time. Then, inspired by Dad's favourite childhood program, the boys decide to create a magic carpet.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Hero Elementary: The Butterfly Chasers/ Something Shady

programme.title: Odd Squad: Haunt Squad/ Safe House in the Woods

programme.desc: Victoria brings home a new boyfriend and the entire family wonders if he's finally 'the one.'

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sight Gag
programme.desc: Doug gives Carrie laser eye surgery for her birthday, but she is left temporarily blinded.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Himmicane
programme.desc: When a hurricane approaches the area, Caroline fears that a big divorce party she's planning for a wealthy couple will get broken up when the unhappy pair get stranded at the dessert bar. Also, Max worries that Randy did break up with her.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Vivica A. Fox, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Whitney Cummings, and Bill Engvall.

programme.title: Black-ish: Son of a Pitch
programme.desc: Junior is working at Stevens & Lido as an intern and takes some time to find his footing; but when he offers an idea during a pitch meeting, Dre immediately puts him in his place.

programme.title: Black-ish: Elder. Scam.
programme.desc: Ruby gets scammed and Dre begins to suspect that she isn't as sharp as she used to be, particularly because she was the one who used to scam other people. Zoey's friend Aaron visits and Diane develops an instant crush on him.

programme.title: People Presents: Harry and Meghan's American Dream
programme.desc: A year after exiting royal life, Prince Harry and Meghan Markle are living the American dream, but also deal with a personal tragedy and tensions with Prince William.

programme.title: Legacies: Long Time, No See
programme.desc: MG finds himself on the outs with the Super Squad after a controversial decision he made comes to light. Hope puts a risky plan in motion regardless of the protentional consequences. Kaleb, Cleo and Alaric join forces when the latest monster shows up.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Cadillac
programme.desc: George's obsession with Marisa Tomei makes Susan suspicious. The only person who may keep Morty from impeachment in Florida turns out to be the woman from whom Jerry stole the marble rye.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Old Man
programme.desc: Jerry, George and Elaine assist senior citizens; Kramer and Newman help an old man.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tinkle Like a Princess
programme.desc: Charlie runs off to Vegas and returns with a new wife, but she's not Chelsea.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Some Kind of Lesbian Zombie
programme.desc: Walden and Alan find themselves on dates with two ideal women until Lyndsey’s jealousy throws a wrench in their evening.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Our Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Erica, Barry and Adam are not happy when their distant relative Gleb visits from Russia, until they realize he can make their lives so much easier. Meanwhile, Beverly starts working on her cookbook, which causes tension with the Frentas.

programme.title: Mom: A Few Thongs and a Hawaiian Funeral
programme.desc: Christy and Jill take Emily to see her biological mother in rehab where they make a surprising discovery, and Bonnie watches Adam's dog while he's out of town.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Private Coach
programme.desc: Mike hopes that hiring a private soccer coach for Eve will help her chances of getting a scholarship, but the ladies in the Baxter household, especially Vanessa, find themselves quite enamoured with the handsome young man who gets the job.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Fight
programme.desc: Mike is surprisingly impressed with Ryan when they take Boyd to a baseball game and have a run-in with a tipsy Bill McKendree who's been on a downward spiral ever since Mike failed to give him the Outdoor Man account.

programme.title: Mom: Kreplach and a Tiny Tush
programme.desc: Christy hosts a family dinner for Violet's hard-to-please future mother-in-law. Also, Bonnie balks when Steve wants to take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Paulie's Secret Recipe/ Knee-jerk Ski Reaction
programme.desc: Brothers battle over a secret recipe; woman sues over ski trip accident.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Active Duty Drama/ Dumpster Dive
programme.desc: A man sues his ex-girlfriend for the return of property. A plaintiff sues a neighbour for utility fees.

programme.title: Protection Court: Relentless Harassers
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Brotherly Loved/ Taco Wars
programme.desc: Disagreement over money transfers; taco truck owner sues for slander.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Spruell vs. Dixon
programme.desc: Friends with benefits might have produced a 13-month-old man.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Cole/ Cole vs. Gilbert/ Baker

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A daughter is sued for damage to a car. Then, a landlord sues his tenant for seven months of unpaid rent and late fees.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff has never met the defendant, but she has petitioned the court for a DNA test to see if they are sisters.

programme.title: Judge Jerry

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Our Children Died in a Fire, It's Your Fault
